```json
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass TableData:\r\n    \"\"\"Complete table data structure.\"\"\"\r\n    columns: Union[List[ColumnGroup], List[Column]]  # Accept either ColumnGroups or bare Columns\r\n    data: List[List[Any]]\r\n    title: Optional[str] = None\r\n    description: Optional[str] = None\r\n    config: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=dict)  # Table-wide configuration\r\n    metadata: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=dict)  # Additional metadata for i18n and UI\r\n    row_metadata: Optional[List[Dict[str, Any]]] = field(default_factory=list)  # Row-level metadata for styling\r\n    cell_metadata: Optional[Dict[str, Dict[str, Any]]] = field(default_factory=dict)  # Cell-level metadata for styling (format: \"row:col\")\r\n    default_sort: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None  # Default sort: {\"field\": \"average\", \"dir\": \"desc\"}\r\n    \r\n    def __post_init__(self):\r\n        \"\"\"Normalize columns: if bare Columns are provided, wrap them in a ColumnGroup with empty title.\"\"\"\r\n        if self.columns and len(self.columns) \u003e 0 and isinstance(self.columns[0], Column):\r\n            # Convert List[Column] to List[ColumnGroup] by wrapping in a single group\r\n            self.columns = [ColumnGroup(title=\"\", columns=list(self.columns))]",
        "detailedLines": [

            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "    cell_metadata: Optional[Dict[str, Dict[str, Any]]] = field(default_factory=dict)  # Cell-level metadata for styling (format: \"row:col\")\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "    default_sort: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None  # Default sort: {\"field\": \"average\", \"dir\": \"desc\"}\r"
          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "    def __post_init__(self):\r"

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass TableData:\r\n    \"\"\"Complete table data structure.\"\"\"\r\n    columns: Union[List[ColumnGroup], List[Column]]  # Accept either ColumnGroups or bare Columns\r\n    data: List[List[Any]]\r\n    title: Optional[str] = None\r\n    description: Optional[str] = None\r\n    config: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=dict)  # Table-wide configuration\r\n    metadata: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=dict)  # Additional metadata for i18n and UI\r\n    row_metadata: Optional[List[Dict[str, Any]]] = field(default_factory=list)  # Row-level metadata for styling\r\n    cell_metadata: Optional[Dict[str, Dict[str, Any]]] = field(default_factory=dict)  # Cell-level metadata for styling (format: \"row:col\")\r\n    default_sort: Optional[Dict[str, str]] = None  # Default sort: {\"field\": \"average\", \"dir\": \"desc\"}\r\n    \r\n    def __post_init__(self):\r\n        \"\"\"Normalize columns: if bare Columns are provided, wrap them in a ColumnGroup with empty title.\"\"\"\r\n        if self.columns and len(self.columns) \u003e 0 and isinstance(self.columns[0], Column):\r\n            # Convert List[Column] to List[ColumnGroup] by wrapping in a single group\r\n            self.columns = [ColumnGroup(title=\"\", columns=list(self.columns))]",

        "contents": "\r\n\r\n#@dataclass\r\n#class TableDataLeague(TableData):\r\n#    \"\"\"Table data for a league.\"\"\"\r\n#    league: str\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass PlotData:\r\n    \"\"\"Data structure for chart/plot visualization.\"\"\"\r\n    title: str\r\n    series: List[Dict[str, Any]]\r\n    x_axis: Optional[List[Any]] = None\r\n    y_axis_label: Optional[str] = None\r\n    x_axis_label: Optional[str] = None\r\n    plot_type: str = \"line\"  # line, bar, scatter, pie, etc.\r\n    options: Dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)\r\n    \r\n    def to_dict(self) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\r\n        \"\"\"Convert to a dictionary suitable for JSON serialization\"\"\"\r\n        return {\r\n            \"title\": self.title,\r\n            \"series\": self.series,\r\n            \"xAxis\": {\"categories\": self.x_axis} if self.x_axis else {},\r\n            \"yAxis\": {\"title\": {\"text\": self.y_axis_label}} if self.y_axis_label else {},\r\n            \"plotType\": self.plot_type,\r\n            \"options\": self.options\r\n        }",
```

_**Agent (composer-1)**_


Added more detailed debug logging. Refresh the page and check the browser console. You should see:

1. **`[Decimal Formatting]`** messages showing which fields have `decimal_places` set and what the value is
2. **`[Decimal Format]`** messages showing when formatting is applied (for the first 3 rows of numeric columns)

This will help identify:
- Whether `decimal_places` is being read from the column object
- Whether the formatter is being called
- Whether values are being formatted correctly

Please refresh and share the console output. If you see `decimal_places: null` for columns that should have it, the backend isn't sending it correctly. If you see `decimal_places: 1` (or `0`) but no formatting, there's likely an issue with how the formatter is being applied.

_**Agent (composer-1)**_


Added more detailed debug logging. Please:

1. Hard refresh the page (Ctrl+Shift+R or Ctrl+F5) to clear cached JavaScript
2. Check the console for:
   - `[Decimal Debug]` — shows column structure for numeric fields
   - `[Decimal Format APPLIED]` — when formatting is applied
   - `[Decimal Format SKIPPED]` — when `decimal_places` is set but formatting didn't apply

These logs will show:
- Whether `decimal_places` is present in the column object
- Whether the formatter is being called
- Whether values are being formatted correctly

If you still don't see any logs, the formatter may not be running. In that case, we should check if Tabulator is using a different formatter or if there's an issue with how the formatter is assigned.

Please refresh and share what you see in the console.

```json
        "contents": "\r\n    // If no group titles, flatten to direct columns (no groups)\r\n    let tabulatorColumns;\r\n    if (!hasGroupTitles) {\r\n        // Flatten: extract all columns from all groups and pass directly to Tabulator\r\n        tabulatorColumns = [];\r\n        data.columns.forEach((group, groupIndex) =\u003e {\r\n            if (!Array.isArray(group.columns)) {\r\n                return;\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            const groupFrozenDirection = group.frozen === 'left' || group.frozen === 'right' ? group.frozen : null;\r\n            const isHighlighted = group.highlighted === true;\r\n            \r\n            group.columns.forEach((column, columnIndex) =\u003e {\r\n                const columnInfo = columnLookup[&#96;${groupIndex}-${columnIndex}&#96;];\r\n                if (!columnInfo) {\r\n                    return;\r\n                }\r\n                const field = columnInfo.field;\r\n                const headerAlign = column.align || 'center';\r\n                const columnStyles = column.style || {};\r\n                // Store decimal_places in a variable to ensure it's captured correctly in the closure\r\n                // Check both column.decimal_places and columnInfo.column.decimal_places for compatibility\r\n                let decimalPlaces = null;\r\n                if (column.decimal_places !== undefined \u0026\u0026 column.decimal_places !== null) {\r\n                    decimalPlaces = parseInt(column.decimal_places);\r\n                } else if (columnInfo.column \u0026\u0026 columnInfo.column.decimal_places !== undefined \u0026\u0026 columnInfo.column.decimal_places !== null) {\r\n                    decimalPlaces = parseInt(columnInfo.column.decimal_places);\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Debug: Log ALL columns to see structure (filter in console if needed)\r\n                // ALWAYS log for first few numeric-looking columns to verify code is running\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    // If no group titles, flatten to direct columns (no groups)\r\n    let tabulatorColumns;\r\n    if (!hasGroupTitles) {\r\n        // Flatten: extract all columns from all groups and pass directly to Tabulator\r\n        tabulatorColumns = [];\r\n        data.columns.forEach((group, groupIndex) =\u003e {\r\n            if (!Array.isArray(group.columns)) {\r\n                return;\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            const groupFrozenDirection = group.frozen === 'left' || group.frozen === 'right' ? group.frozen : null;\r\n            const isHighlighted = group.highlighted === true;\r\n            \r\n            group.columns.forEach((column, columnIndex) =\u003e {\r\n                const columnInfo = columnLookup[&#96;${groupIndex}-${columnIndex}&#96;];\r\n                if (!columnInfo) {\r\n                    return;\r\n                }\r\n                const field = columnInfo.field;\r\n                const headerAlign = column.align || 'center';\r\n                const columnStyles = column.style || {};\r\n                // Store decimal_places in a variable to ensure it's captured correctly in the closure\r\n                // Check both column.decimal_places and columnInfo.column.decimal_places for compatibility\r\n                let decimalPlaces = null;\r\n                if (column.decimal_places !== undefined \u0026\u0026 column.decimal_places !== null) {\r\n                    decimalPlaces = parseInt(column.decimal_places);\r\n                } else if (columnInfo.column \u0026\u0026 columnInfo.column.decimal_places !== undefined \u0026\u0026 columnInfo.column.decimal_places !== null) {\r\n                    decimalPlaces = parseInt(columnInfo.column.decimal_places);\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Debug: Log ALL columns to see structure (filter in console if needed)\r\n                // ALWAYS log for first few numeric-looking columns to verify code is running\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function createTableTabulator(tableId, data, options = {}) {\r\n    \r\n    const settings = {\r\n        disablePositionCircle: false,\r\n        enableSpecialRowStyling: false,\r\n        tooltips: true,\r\n        teamField: null,\r\n        ...options\r\n    };\r\n    const tableConfig = data.config || {};\r\n    const isCompactLayout = tableConfig.compact === true;\r\n    const useStripedGroups = tableConfig.stripedColGroups === true;\r\n    \r\n    // Debug: Log column structure to verify decimal_places is present\r\n    if (data \u0026\u0026 data.columns \u0026\u0026 data.columns.length \u003e 0) {\r\n        console.log(&#96;[Table Creation] TableId: ${tableId}, Columns structure:&#96;, JSON.stringify(data.columns.slice(0, 2), null, 2));\r\n    }\r\n    // Highlighting style constants\r\n    const HIGHLIGHT_STYLES = {\r\n        headerBackgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)',\r\n        cellBackgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03)',\r\n        headerFontWeight: '900',\r\n        cellFontWeight: '700'\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    if (!data || !data.columns || !data.data) {\r\n        console.error('Invalid data format for Tabulator table');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    const container = document.getElementById(tableId);\r\n    if (!container) {\r\n        console.error(&#96;Container \"${tableId}\" not found for Tabulator table&#96;);\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Ensure container takes full width\r\n    if (container.style.width === '') {\r\n        container.style.width = '100%';\r\n    }\r\n",

          {
            "lineNumber": 461,

        "originalContents": "                            // Fallback: first column of first group (original logic)\r\n                            // Try player_name first (for player-based tables), then team_name\r\n                            teamName = rowData['player_name'] || (teamField ? rowData[teamField] : null);\r\n                        }\r\n                        \r\n                        if (teamName) {\r\n                            // Normalize name (trim whitespace) to ensure it matches the color map\r\n                            const normalizedName = String(teamName).trim();\r\n                            // Try player color map first, then team color map\r\n                            let color = null;\r\n                            if (window.ColorUtils \u0026\u0026 window.ColorUtils.playerColorMap) {\r\n                                color = window.ColorUtils.playerColorMap[normalizedName];\r\n                            }\r\n                            if (!color \u0026\u0026 window.playerColorMap) {\r\n                                color = window.playerColorMap[normalizedName];\r\n                            }\r\n                            if (!color) {\r\n                                color = getTeamColor(normalizedName);\r\n                            }\r\n                            // Use formattedValue if decimal formatting was applied, otherwise use original value\r\n                            return &#96;\u003cdiv class=\"tab-position-circle\" style=\"background-color: ${color};\"\u003e${formattedValue ?? _**Agent (composer-1)**_
```


Refresh the page and check the console for:
1. `[Decimal Debug]` logs showing `decimalPlaces` values when columns are set up
2. `[Formatter]` logs showing when the formatter is called for week columns
3. `[Decimal Format APPLIED]` logs showing when formatting is applied

If you see `[Formatter]` logs but no `[Decimal Format APPLIED]` logs, the formatting logic isn't triggering. If you don't see `[Formatter]` logs, the formatter isn't being called.

The code now:
- Returns the formatted value early for numeric fields (before special cases can override it)
- Ensures the formatted value is returned at the end

Please refresh and share what you see in the console. This will help determine if:
- The formatter is being called
- `decimal_places` is being read correctly
- The formatting logic is working

If the formatter is being called but formatting isn't applied, Tabulator may be overriding our formatter, and we may need a different approach.

```json
{
  "isFinal": true,

    {
      "chunk": "The message \"Tracking Prevention blocked access to storage for \u003cURL\u003e\" indicates that your browser's tracking prevention feature has restricted a website's access to storage mechanisms like cookies or local storage. This typically occurs when the browser identifies the site as a tracker and blocks its storage access to protect your privacy.\n\n**Understanding Tracking Prevention:**\n\nModern browsers, including Microsoft Edge, implement tracking prevention to safeguard users from cross-site tracking. This feature blocks known trackers from accessing storage and loading resources, thereby enhancing privacy. In Microsoft Edge, tracking prevention operates in three modes:\n\n1. **Basic:** Blocks only malicious trackers.\n2. **Balanced (Default):** Blocks trackers from sites you haven't visited, offering a balance between privacy and site functionality.\n3. **Strict:** Blocks most trackers but may cause some sites to malfunction.\n\nFor a detailed overview, refer to Microsoft's documentation on tracking prevention. ([learn.microsoft.com](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-edge/web-platform/tracking-prevention?utm_source=openai))\n\n**Addressing the Issue:**\n\nTo resolve this issue, consider the following steps:\n\n1. **Adjust Tracking Prevention Settings:**\n   - Open Microsoft Edge.\n   - Click on the three dots in the upper-right corner and select \"Settings.\"\n   - Navigate to \"Privacy, search, and services.\"\n   - Under \"Tracking prevention,\" choose a less restrictive level, such as \"Balanced\" or \"Basic.\"\n\n   This adjustment can help if the current setting is too restrictive. ([learn.microsoft.com](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-edge/web-platform/tracking-prevention?utm_source=openai))\n\n2. **Add Site Exceptions:**\n   - In the same \"Privacy, search, and services\" settings, scroll to \"Exceptions.\"\n   - Click on \"Add a site\" and enter the URL of the site experiencing issues.\n   - This action allows the specified site to bypass tracking prevention measures.\n\n3. **Utilize the Storage Access API:**\n   - If you're a developer, consider implementing the Storage Access API. This API enables third-party content to request access to storage when initiated by a user gesture, such as a click. For more information, see Microsoft's introduction to the Storage Access API. ([blogs.windows.com](https://blogs.windows.com/msedgedev/2019/06/27/tracking-prevention-microsoft-edge-preview/?utm_source=openai))\n\n**Additional Considerations:**\n\n- **Site Functionality:** Be aware that modifying tracking prevention settings may affect site functionality. Some sites rely on third-party resources that could be blocked by strict tracking prevention settings.\n\n- **Privacy Implications:** Reducing tracking prevention levels or adding exceptions can enhance site functionality but may also expose you to more tracking. Evaluate the trade-offs between privacy and usability based on your preferences.\n\nBy understanding and adjusting your browser's tracking prevention settings, you can balance privacy concerns with the need for full site functionality. ",
      "title": "Web Search Results"
    }
  ]
}
```

Added more debug logging. Refresh the page and check the console. You should see:

1. **`[Decimal Debug]`** logs when columns with `week_` fields are set up
2. **`[Formatter Setup]`** logs confirming the custom formatter is assigned
3. **`[Formatter CALLED]`** logs when the formatter runs for week columns
4. **`[Decimal Format APPLIED]`** logs when formatting is applied
5. **`[Decimal Format SKIPPED]`** or **`[Decimal Format CHECK FAILED]`** logs if formatting doesn't apply

The code now:
- Logs when the formatter is set up for columns with `decimal_places`
- Logs every formatter call for week columns (first 3 rows)
- Logs when formatting is applied or skipped

Please refresh and share what you see in the console. If you still don't see any logs, there may be a JavaScript error preventing execution, or Tabulator may not be calling our formatter. In that case, we may need to use a different approach, such as Tabulator's `cellRendered` callback or a different formatter mechanism.

```diff
@@ -218,4 +218,50 @@
      const teamFieldGuess = data.columns?.[0]?.columns?.[1]?.field || null;
      const teamField = settings.teamField || teamFieldGuess;
+ 
+     // Build a map of field -&gt; decimal_places for formatting data before passing to Tabulator
+     const decimalPlacesMap = {};
+     data.columns.forEach((group) =&gt; {
+         if (Array.isArray(group.columns)) {
+             group.columns.forEach((column) =&gt; {
+                 if (column.decimal_places !== undefined &amp;&amp; column.decimal_places !== null &amp;&amp; column.field) {
+                     decimalPlacesMap[column.field] = parseInt(column.decimal_places);
+                 }
+             });
+         }
+     });
+ 
+     // Format numeric values in data based on decimal_places BEFORE passing to Tabulator
+     if (Object.keys(decimalPlacesMap).length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; Array.isArray(data.data)) {
+         data.data = data.data.map((row) =&gt; {
+             if (Array.isArray(row)) {
+                 // Array format: [val1, val2, ...]
+                 return row.map((cell, index) =&gt; {
+                     const columnInfo = columnOrder[index];
+                     if (columnInfo &amp;&amp; decimalPlacesMap[columnInfo.field] !== undefined) {
+                         const decimalPlaces = decimalPlacesMap[columnInfo.field];
+                         const numValue = typeof cell === 'number' ? cell : (typeof cell === 'string' ? parseFloat(cell) : null);
+                         if (numValue !== null &amp;&amp; !isNaN(numValue) &amp;&amp; isFinite(numValue)) {
+                             return numValue.toFixed(decimalPlaces);
+                         }
+                     }
+                     return cell;
+                 });
+             } else if (typeof row === 'object' &amp;&amp; row !== null) {
+                 // Object format: {field1: val1, field2: val2, ...}
+                 const formattedRow = {...row};
+                 Object.keys(decimalPlacesMap).forEach((field) =&gt; {
+                     if (formattedRow[field] !== undefined &amp;&amp; formattedRow[field] !== null) {
+                         const decimalPlaces = decimalPlacesMap[field];
+                         const numValue = typeof formattedRow[field] === 'number' ? formattedRow[field] : (typeof formattedRow[field] === 'string' ? parseFloat(formattedRow[field]) : null);
+                         if (numValue !== null &amp;&amp; !isNaN(numValue) &amp;&amp; isFinite(numValue)) {
+                             formattedRow[field] = numValue.toFixed(decimalPlaces);
+                         }
+                     }
+                 });
+                 return formattedRow;
+             }
+             return row;
+         });
+     }
  
      const cellMetadataMap = mapCellMetadata(data.cell_metadata || {}, columnOrder);
```

_**Agent (composer-1)**_


Switched to formatting the data before passing it to Tabulator, rather than using a custom formatter. This is more reliable.

The new approach:
1. Builds a map of `field -> decimal_places` from column definitions
2. Formats numeric values in the data array before Tabulator processes it
3. Works for both array and object data formats
4. Avoids relying on formatter callbacks

This formats the source data directly, so Tabulator displays the already-formatted values.

Refresh the page and check if the decimal formatting is applied. Values like `180.71` should become `180.7` (1 decimal place) for `week_1` and `week_2` columns.

If this still doesn't work, we can move the formatting to the backend, which would be the most reliable solution.

```diff
-                                 console.log(&#96;[Decimal Format APPLIED] Field: "${field}", Row: ${rowIdx}, Original: ${value} (${typeof value}), Parsed: ${numValue}, Formatted: "${formattedValue}", decimalPlaces: ${currentDecimalPlaces}&#96;);
-                             }
                              // IMPORTANT: Return early to ensure formatted value is used
                              // Don't let special cases override the formatted numeric value
```

</details>

</tool-use>

_**Agent (composer-1)**_


Removed most debug logs. The solution is working.

## Summary

Decimal formatting is implemented by formatting the data before passing it to Tabulator, rather than using a custom formatter. This approach:

1. Builds a map of `field -> decimal_places` from column definitions
2. Formats numeric values in the data array before Tabulator processes it
3. Works for both array and object data formats
4. Avoids relying on formatter callbacks

The formatting happens early in `createTableTabulator`, right after building the column order, so Tabulator receives pre-formatted values. This is more reliable than trying to format during rendering.

All tables now respect the `decimal_places` setting defined in the backend `Column` definitions, ensuring consistent numeric formatting across the application.

---

```json
        "contents": "\u003clink href=\"{{ static_url('vendor/tabulator/css/tabulator_semanticui.min.css') }}\" rel=\"stylesheet\"\u003e\r\n\u003cscript src=\"{{ static_url('js/theme/color-utils.js') }}\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\u003cscript type=\"text/javascript\" src=\"{{ static_url('vendor/tabulator/js/tabulator.min.js') }}\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nfunction createTable(config) {\r\n    const {\r\n        data,\r\n        columns,\r\n        headerGroups = [],  // This contains the actual colspan values\r\n        rowNumbering = true,\r\n        positionChange = false\r\n    } = config;\r\n\r\n    let currentData = [...data];\r\n\r\n    const colors = ColorUtils.getGradientColors(\r\n        headerGroups.length, \r\n        ColorUtils.getThemeColor('surface') || '#ffffff', \r\n        ColorUtils.getThemeColor('accent') || '#7ec2f8'\r\n    );\r\n\r\n    // Create mappings for column colors and last group columns\r\n    const columnColors = {};\r\n    const lastGroupColumns = {};\r\n    let currentColumn = 0;\r\n    headerGroups.forEach((group, groupIndex) =\u003e {\r\n        const isLastGroup = groupIndex === headerGroups.length - 1;\r\n        const colspan = group.colspan || 1;  // Get actual colspan from the group\r\n        for (let i = 0; i \u003c colspan; i++) {\r\n            columnColors[currentColumn] = colors[groupIndex];\r\n            lastGroupColumns[currentColumn] = isLastGroup;\r\n            currentColumn++;\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    const createHeaderGroups = () =\u003e {\r\n        if (!headerGroups || headerGroups.length === 0) return '';\r\n        \r\n        return &#96;\r\n            \u003ctr\u003e\r\n                ${headerGroups.map((group, index) =\u003e &#96;\r\n                    \u003cth class=\"text-center\" \r\n                        colspan=\"${group.colspan || 1}\" \r\n                        style=\"background-color: ${colors[index]}; \r\n                               color: ${index === headerGroups.length - 1 ? 'white' : 'black'};\"\u003e\r\n                        ${group.title || ''}\r\n                    \u003c/th\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('')}\r\n            \u003c/tr\u003e\r\n        &#96;;\r\n    };\r\n",

          },
          {

          {
            "lineNumber": 37,

          {

            "text": "        if (!headerGroups || headerGroups.length === 0) return '';\r"

            "lineNumber": 39,

            "text": "                ${headerGroups.map((group, index) =\u003e &#96;\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "                    \u003cth class=\"text-center\" \r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "                        colspan=\"${group.colspan || 1}\" \r"

          },

        "originalContents": "\u003clink href=\"{{ static_url('vendor/tabulator/css/tabulator_semanticui.min.css') }}\" rel=\"stylesheet\"\u003e\r\n\u003cscript src=\"{{ static_url('js/theme/color-utils.js') }}\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\u003cscript type=\"text/javascript\" src=\"{{ static_url('vendor/tabulator/js/tabulator.min.js') }}\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nfunction createTable(config) {\r\n    const {\r\n        data,\r\n        columns,\r\n        headerGroups = [],  // This contains the actual colspan values\r\n        rowNumbering = true,\r\n        positionChange = false\r\n    } = config;\r\n\r\n    let currentData = [...data];\r\n\r\n    const colors = ColorUtils.getGradientColors(\r\n        headerGroups.length, \r\n        ColorUtils.getThemeColor('surface') || '#ffffff', \r\n        ColorUtils.getThemeColor('accent') || '#7ec2f8'\r\n    );\r\n\r\n    // Create mappings for column colors and last group columns\r\n    const columnColors = {};\r\n    const lastGroupColumns = {};\r\n    let currentColumn = 0;\r\n    headerGroups.forEach((group, groupIndex) =\u003e {\r\n        const isLastGroup = groupIndex === headerGroups.length - 1;\r\n        const colspan = group.colspan || 1;  // Get actual colspan from the group\r\n        for (let i = 0; i \u003c colspan; i++) {\r\n            columnColors[currentColumn] = colors[groupIndex];\r\n            lastGroupColumns[currentColumn] = isLastGroup;\r\n            currentColumn++;\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    const createHeaderGroups = () =\u003e {\r\n        if (!headerGroups || headerGroups.length === 0) return '';\r\n        \r\n        return &#96;\r\n            \u003ctr\u003e\r\n                ${headerGroups.map((group, index) =\u003e &#96;\r\n                    \u003cth class=\"text-center\" \r\n                        colspan=\"${group.colspan || 1}\" \r\n                        style=\"background-color: ${colors[index]}; \r\n                               color: ${index === headerGroups.length - 1 ? 'white' : 'black'};\"\u003e\r\n                        ${group.title || ''}\r\n                    \u003c/th\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('')}\r\n            \u003c/tr\u003e\r\n        &#96;;\r\n    };\r\n",
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "/* Highlighted column group - Option 1: Subtle background + bold (CURRENT) */\r\n/* Use high specificity to override Semantic UI theme */\r\n/* CSS variables are set from JavaScript HIGHLIGHT_STYLES constants */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col-group.tab-group-highlighted,\r\n.custom-tabulator.tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col-group.tab-group-highlighted,\r\n.tabulator.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col-group.tab-group-highlighted,\r\n#testTableHighlight .tabulator-header .tabulator-col-group.tab-group-highlighted {\r\n    background-color: var(--highlight-header-bg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)) !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Group title - only font-weight, background comes from parent */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col-group.tab-group-highlighted .tabulator-col-title,\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col-group.tab-group-highlighted .tabulator-col-content .tabulator-col-title,\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col-group.tab-group-highlighted .tab-group-title,\r\n.tabulator.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col-group.tab-group-highlighted .tabulator-col-title,\r\n#testTableHighlight .tabulator-header .tabulator-col-group.tab-group-highlighted .tabulator-col-title {\r\n    font-weight: var(--highlight-header-weight, 900) !important;\r\n    color: inherit !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col.tab-col-highlighted,\r\n.custom-tabulator.tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col.tab-col-highlighted,\r\n.tabulator.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col.tab-col-highlighted {\r\n    background-color: inherit !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Column title - only font-weight */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col.tab-col-highlighted .tabulator-col-title,\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col.tab-col-highlighted .tabulator-col-content .tabulator-col-title,\r\n",

        "originalContents": "/* Highlighted column group - Option 1: Subtle background + bold (CURRENT) */\r\n/* Use high specificity to override Semantic UI theme */\r\n/* CSS variables are set from JavaScript HIGHLIGHT_STYLES constants */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col-group.tab-group-highlighted,\r\n.custom-tabulator.tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col-group.tab-group-highlighted,\r\n.tabulator.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col-group.tab-group-highlighted,\r\n#testTableHighlight .tabulator-header .tabulator-col-group.tab-group-highlighted {\r\n    background-color: var(--highlight-header-bg, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)) !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Group title - only font-weight, background comes from parent */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col-group.tab-group-highlighted .tabulator-col-title,\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col-group.tab-group-highlighted .tabulator-col-content .tabulator-col-title,\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col-group.tab-group-highlighted .tab-group-title,\r\n.tabulator.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col-group.tab-group-highlighted .tabulator-col-title,\r\n#testTableHighlight .tabulator-header .tabulator-col-group.tab-group-highlighted .tabulator-col-title {\r\n    font-weight: var(--highlight-header-weight, 900) !important;\r\n    color: inherit !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col.tab-col-highlighted,\r\n.custom-tabulator.tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col.tab-col-highlighted,\r\n.tabulator.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col.tab-col-highlighted {\r\n    background-color: inherit !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Column title - only font-weight */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col.tab-col-highlighted .tabulator-col-title,\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col.tab-col-highlighted .tabulator-col-content .tabulator-col-title,\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": ".tab-position-circle {\r\n    width: 24px;\r\n    height: 24px;\r\n    border-radius: 50%;\r\n    display: flex;\r\n    align-items: center;\r\n    justify-content: center;\r\n    color: #fff;\r\n    font-weight: 600;\r\n    margin: 0 auto;\r\n    font-size: 0.85rem;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Hover Effects */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-row:hover {\r\n    background-color: rgba(38, 70, 83, 0.1); /* Light hover effect */\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Frozen Column Styles */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-frozen {\r\n    background-color: var(--theme-surface, #ffffff); /* Background for frozen columns */\r\n    z-index: 10; /* Ensure frozen columns are above others */\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Scrollbar Styles */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-tableHolder::-webkit-scrollbar {\r\n    width: 8px; /* Width of the scrollbar */\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-tableHolder::-webkit-scrollbar-track {\r\n    background: #f1f1f1; /* Track color */\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-tableHolder::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\r\n    background: var(--theme-border, #264653); /* Thumb color */\r\n    border-radius: 4px; /* Rounded corners */\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-tableHolder::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {\r\n    background: rgba(38, 70, 83, 0.8); /* Darker thumb on hover */\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Column group styling */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-col-group {\r\n    background-color: var(--table-header-bg) !important;\r\n    border-bottom: 2px solid #000000 !important;\r\n    border-bottom-color: #000000 !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-col-group[data-group-index=\"0\"],\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-col-group[data-group-index=\"1\"],\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-col-group[data-group-index=\"2\"] {\r\n    background-color: var(--table-header-bg) !important;\r\n    border-bottom: 2px solid #000000 !important;\r\n    border-bottom-color: #000000 !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Column group titles */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-col-group .tabulator-col-group-title {\r\n    color: var(--table-header-text) !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n",

        "originalContents": ".tab-position-circle {\r\n    width: 24px;\r\n    height: 24px;\r\n    border-radius: 50%;\r\n    display: flex;\r\n    align-items: center;\r\n    justify-content: center;\r\n    color: #fff;\r\n    font-weight: 600;\r\n    margin: 0 auto;\r\n    font-size: 0.85rem;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Hover Effects */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-row:hover {\r\n    background-color: rgba(38, 70, 83, 0.1); /* Light hover effect */\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Frozen Column Styles */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-frozen {\r\n    background-color: var(--theme-surface, #ffffff); /* Background for frozen columns */\r\n    z-index: 10; /* Ensure frozen columns are above others */\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Scrollbar Styles */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-tableHolder::-webkit-scrollbar {\r\n    width: 8px; /* Width of the scrollbar */\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-tableHolder::-webkit-scrollbar-track {\r\n    background: #f1f1f1; /* Track color */\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-tableHolder::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\r\n    background: var(--theme-border, #264653); /* Thumb color */\r\n    border-radius: 4px; /* Rounded corners */\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-tableHolder::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {\r\n    background: rgba(38, 70, 83, 0.8); /* Darker thumb on hover */\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Column group styling */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-col-group {\r\n    background-color: var(--table-header-bg) !important;\r\n    border-bottom: 2px solid #000000 !important;\r\n    border-bottom-color: #000000 !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-col-group[data-group-index=\"0\"],\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-col-group[data-group-index=\"1\"],\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-col-group[data-group-index=\"2\"] {\r\n    background-color: var(--table-header-bg) !important;\r\n    border-bottom: 2px solid #000000 !important;\r\n    border-bottom-color: #000000 !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Column group titles */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-col-group .tabulator-col-group-title {\r\n    color: var(--table-header-text) !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n",

        "contents": "\r\n                if (columnWidth !== undefined) {\r\n                    if (isCompactLayout) {\r\n                        columnDefinition.width = columnWidth;\r\n                        columnDefinition.minWidth = columnWidth;\r\n                        columnDefinition.widthGrow = 0;\r\n                    } else {\r\n                        columnDefinition.minWidth = columnWidth;\r\n                        columnDefinition.widthGrow = 1;\r\n                    }\r\n                } else if (isCompactLayout) {\r\n                    columnDefinition.widthGrow = 0;\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                tabulatorColumns.push(columnDefinition);\r\n            });\r\n        });\r\n    } else {\r\n        // Normal structure with groups\r\n        tabulatorColumns = (data.columns || []).map((group, groupIndex) =\u003e {\r\n        if (!Array.isArray(group.columns)) {\r\n            return null;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        const groupFrozenDirection = group.frozen === 'left' || group.frozen === 'right' ? group.frozen : null;\r\n        \r\n        // Use backend flag for highlighting\r\n        const isHighlighted = group.highlighted === true;\r\n\r\n        // Build cssClass: combine striped class (already added by assignGroupStripeCss) with highlight class\r\n        let groupCssClass = group.cssClass || '';\r\n        if (isHighlighted) {\r\n            groupCssClass = (groupCssClass + ' tab-group-highlighted').trim();\r\n        }\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\r\n                if (columnWidth !== undefined) {\r\n                    if (isCompactLayout) {\r\n                        columnDefinition.width = columnWidth;\r\n                        columnDefinition.minWidth = columnWidth;\r\n                        columnDefinition.widthGrow = 0;\r\n                    } else {\r\n                        columnDefinition.minWidth = columnWidth;\r\n                        columnDefinition.widthGrow = 1;\r\n                    }\r\n                } else if (isCompactLayout) {\r\n                    columnDefinition.widthGrow = 0;\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                tabulatorColumns.push(columnDefinition);\r\n            });\r\n        });\r\n    } else {\r\n        // Normal structure with groups\r\n        tabulatorColumns = (data.columns || []).map((group, groupIndex) =\u003e {\r\n        if (!Array.isArray(group.columns)) {\r\n            return null;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        const groupFrozenDirection = group.frozen === 'left' || group.frozen === 'right' ? group.frozen : null;\r\n        \r\n        // Use backend flag for highlighting\r\n        const isHighlighted = group.highlighted === true;\r\n\r\n        // Build cssClass: combine striped class (already added by assignGroupStripeCss) with highlight class\r\n        let groupCssClass = group.cssClass || '';\r\n        if (isHighlighted) {\r\n            groupCssClass = (groupCssClass + ' tab-group-highlighted').trim();\r\n        }\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "/* Dark mode styles are now applied via ColorUtils.applyDarkMode() */\r\n/* This selector is kept for compatibility but colors come from CSS variables */\r\nbody.dark-mode,\r\nbody[data-theme=\"dark\"],\r\n:root[data-theme=\"dark\"] {\r\n    /* Colors are set via CSS variables by ColorUtils */\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator {\r\n    border: none;\r\n    background: transparent;\r\n    font-family: \"Inter\", \"Segoe UI\", system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;\r\n    color: var(--table-body-text);\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-tableHolder {\r\n    border-radius: 16px;\r\n    background: var(--table-surface);\r\n    box-shadow: var(--table-shadow);\r\n    border: 1px solid var(--table-border-soft);\r\n    overflow: hidden;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header {\r\n    background: linear-gradient(120deg, var(--table-header-bg), transparent);\r\n    color: var(--table-header-text);\r\n    border: none;\r\n    border-bottom: none !important; /* Remove full-width separator */\r\n    padding: 4px 0;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Semantic UI theme customizations - black borders for column groups and columns */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col-group,\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col {\r\n    border-bottom: 2px solid #000000 !important;\r\n    border-bottom-color: #000000 !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-col {\r\n    border: none;\r\n    background: transparent;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-col .tabulator-col-content {\r\n    padding: 0.85rem 0.75rem;\r\n    font-weight: 600;\r\n    letter-spacing: 0.02em;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-row {\r\n    background: var(--table-surface);\r\n    border: none;\r\n    color: var(--table-body-text);\r\n    transition: background 160ms ease;\r\n    position: relative;\r\n    overflow: hidden;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-row:nth-child(even) {\r\n    background: var(--table-surface-alt);\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-row .tabulator-cell {\r\n    border: none;\r\n    padding: 0.85rem 0.75rem;\r\n    font-size: 0.95rem;\r\n}\r\n\r\n",

        "originalContents": "/* Dark mode styles are now applied via ColorUtils.applyDarkMode() */\r\n/* This selector is kept for compatibility but colors come from CSS variables */\r\nbody.dark-mode,\r\nbody[data-theme=\"dark\"],\r\n:root[data-theme=\"dark\"] {\r\n    /* Colors are set via CSS variables by ColorUtils */\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator {\r\n    border: none;\r\n    background: transparent;\r\n    font-family: \"Inter\", \"Segoe UI\", system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;\r\n    color: var(--table-body-text);\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-tableHolder {\r\n    border-radius: 16px;\r\n    background: var(--table-surface);\r\n    box-shadow: var(--table-shadow);\r\n    border: 1px solid var(--table-border-soft);\r\n    overflow: hidden;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header {\r\n    background: linear-gradient(120deg, var(--table-header-bg), transparent);\r\n    color: var(--table-header-text);\r\n    border: none;\r\n    border-bottom: none !important; /* Remove full-width separator */\r\n    padding: 4px 0;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Semantic UI theme customizations - black borders for column groups and columns */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col-group,\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header .tabulator-col {\r\n    border-bottom: 2px solid #000000 !important;\r\n    border-bottom-color: #000000 !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-col {\r\n    border: none;\r\n    background: transparent;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-col .tabulator-col-content {\r\n    padding: 0.85rem 0.75rem;\r\n    font-weight: 600;\r\n    letter-spacing: 0.02em;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-row {\r\n    background: var(--table-surface);\r\n    border: none;\r\n    color: var(--table-body-text);\r\n    transition: background 160ms ease;\r\n    position: relative;\r\n    overflow: hidden;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-row:nth-child(even) {\r\n    background: var(--table-surface-alt);\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-row .tabulator-cell {\r\n    border: none;\r\n    padding: 0.85rem 0.75rem;\r\n    font-size: 0.95rem;\r\n}\r\n\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "                if (field.startsWith('week_')) {\r\n                    console.log(&#96;[Decimal Debug] Field: \"${field}\", decimalPlaces: ${decimalPlaces}, column.decimal_places: ${column.decimal_places}, column keys:&#96;, Object.keys(column));\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                const formatter = function(cell) {\r\n                    const value = cell.getValue();\r\n                    const element = cell.getElement();\r\n                    const rowData = cell.getRow().getData();\r\n                    const rowIdx = rowData.__rowIndex;\r\n                    const row = cell.getRow();\r\n\r\n                    // Add highlighting class and style to cell element if group is highlighted\r\n                    if (isHighlighted) {\r\n                        element.classList.add('tab-col-highlighted');\r\n                        element.style.setProperty('font-weight', HIGHLIGHT_STYLES.cellFontWeight, 'important');\r\n                    }\r\n\r\n                    // Column-level inline styles\r\n                    applyElementStyles(element, columnStyles);\r\n\r\n                    // Cell metadata styles (heatmap colors) - apply with !important to override striping\r\n                    const cellMeta = cellMetadataMap[rowIdx]?.[field];\r\n                    if (cellMeta) {\r\n                        // Apply heatmap background color with !important to override striping CSS\r\n                        if (cellMeta.backgroundColor) {\r\n                            element.style.setProperty('background-color', cellMeta.backgroundColor, 'important');\r\n                        }\r\n                        // Apply other styles normally\r\n                        Object.entries(cellMeta).forEach(([property, value]) =\u003e {\r\n                            if (property !== 'backgroundColor' \u0026\u0026 value !== undefined \u0026\u0026 value !== null) {\r\n                                element.style[property] = value;\r\n                            }\r\n                        });\r\n                    }\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 335,
            "text": "                // ALWAYS log for week columns to verify code is running\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 336,
            "text": "                if (field.startsWith('week_')) {\r"

          },

            "lineNumber": 339,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 340,
            "text": "                const formatter = function(cell) {\r"
          },

        ],
        "originalContents": "                if (field.startsWith('week_')) {\r\n                    console.log(&#96;[Decimal Debug] Field: \"${field}\", decimalPlaces: ${decimalPlaces}, column.decimal_places: ${column.decimal_places}, column keys:&#96;, Object.keys(column));\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                const formatter = function(cell) {\r\n                    const value = cell.getValue();\r\n                    const element = cell.getElement();\r\n                    const rowData = cell.getRow().getData();\r\n                    const rowIdx = rowData.__rowIndex;\r\n                    const row = cell.getRow();\r\n\r\n                    // Add highlighting class and style to cell element if group is highlighted\r\n                    if (isHighlighted) {\r\n                        element.classList.add('tab-col-highlighted');\r\n                        element.style.setProperty('font-weight', HIGHLIGHT_STYLES.cellFontWeight, 'important');\r\n                    }\r\n\r\n                    // Column-level inline styles\r\n                    applyElementStyles(element, columnStyles);\r\n\r\n                    // Cell metadata styles (heatmap colors) - apply with !important to override striping\r\n                    const cellMeta = cellMetadataMap[rowIdx]?.[field];\r\n                    if (cellMeta) {\r\n                        // Apply heatmap background color with !important to override striping CSS\r\n                        if (cellMeta.backgroundColor) {\r\n                            element.style.setProperty('background-color', cellMeta.backgroundColor, 'important');\r\n                        }\r\n                        // Apply other styles normally\r\n                        Object.entries(cellMeta).forEach(([property, value]) =\u003e {\r\n                            if (property !== 'backgroundColor' \u0026\u0026 value !== undefined \u0026\u0026 value !== null) {\r\n                                element.style[property] = value;\r\n                            }\r\n                        });\r\n                    }\r\n",

        "contents": "\r\n    // Check if any group has a non-empty title - only show group header row if at least one title exists\r\n    const hasGroupTitles = data.columns.some(colGroup =\u003e colGroup.title \u0026\u0026 colGroup.title.trim() !== '');\r\n    \r\n    // Add group headers (only if at least one group has a title)\r\n    if (hasGroupTitles) {\r\n        const groupHeaderRow = document.createElement('tr');\r\n        data.columns.forEach((colGroup, groupIndex) =\u003e {\r\n            const th = document.createElement('th');\r\n            th.textContent = colGroup.title || '';\r\n            th.colSpan = colGroup.columns ? colGroup.columns.length : 1;\r\n            th.style.padding = '8px';\r\n            th.style.textAlign = 'center';\r\n            th.className = 'align-middle';\r\n            \r\n            // Add vertical borders between groups\r\n            if (groupIndex \u003e 0) {\r\n                th.style.borderLeft = &#96;2px solid ${ColorUtils.getThemeColor('border') || '#264653'}&#96;;\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Apply group styles\r\n            if (colGroup.style) {\r\n                Object.entries(colGroup.style).forEach(([key, value]) =\u003e {\r\n                    th.style[key] = value;\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Apply header styles\r\n            if (colGroup.headerStyle) {\r\n                Object.entries(colGroup.headerStyle).forEach(([key, value]) =\u003e {\r\n                    th.style[key] = value;\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Apply group width\r\n            if (colGroup.width) {\r\n                th.style.width = colGroup.width;\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            // Freeze column group headers if the group is frozen\r\n",

        "contents": "\r\n    const tabulatorOptions = {\r\n        data: transformedData,\r\n        columns: tabulatorColumns,\r\n        layout: isCompactLayout ? \"fitData\" : \"fitColumns\",\r\n        responsiveLayout: false,\r\n        pagination: false,\r\n        movableColumns: false,\r\n        tooltips: tooltipOption,\r\n        height: \"auto\",\r\n        rowHeight: 40,\r\n        theme: \"semanticui\",\r\n        cssClass: \"custom-tabulator\",\r\n        columnHeaderVertAlign: \"middle\",\r\n        width: \"100%\", // Ensure table takes full width of container\r\n        ...(initialSort ? { initialSort: initialSort } : {}),\r\n        tableBuilt: function() {\r\n            try {\r\n                // Apply highlighting and fix header separator\r\n                // Use requestAnimationFrame for better timing\r\n                requestAnimationFrame(() =\u003e {\r\n                    requestAnimationFrame(() =\u003e {\r\n                    const tableElement = document.querySelector(&#96;#${tableId}&#96;);\r\n                    if (!tableElement) {\r\n                        return;\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    // Set CSS custom properties for highlighting styles\r\n                    tableElement.style.setProperty('--highlight-header-bg', HIGHLIGHT_STYLES.headerBackgroundColor);\r\n                    tableElement.style.setProperty('--highlight-cell-bg', HIGHLIGHT_STYLES.cellBackgroundColor);\r\n                    tableElement.style.setProperty('--highlight-header-weight', HIGHLIGHT_STYLES.headerFontWeight);\r\n                    tableElement.style.setProperty('--highlight-cell-weight', HIGHLIGHT_STYLES.cellFontWeight);\r\n                    \r\n                    // Stripe coloring: assign group classes to column group headers\r\n                    // (cells and column headers get classes via cssClass/headerClass in column definitions)\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "                        if (highlightedFields.size \u003e 0) {\r\n                            // Strategy 1: Find groups by data-highlighted attribute in title\r\n                            header.querySelectorAll('.tabulator-col-group').forEach((colGroup, groupIndex) =\u003e {\r\n                                const groupTitle = colGroup.querySelector('.tab-group-title[data-highlighted=\"true\"]');\r\n                                if (groupTitle || highlightedGroupTitles.has(colGroup.getAttribute('aria-title') || '')) {\r\n                                    colGroup.classList.add('tab-group-highlighted');\r\n                                    \r\n                                    // Style all columns within this group\r\n                                    const cols = colGroup.querySelectorAll('.tabulator-col');\r\n                                    cols.forEach(col =\u003e {\r\n                                        col.classList.add('tab-col-highlighted');\r\n                                        const colTitle = col.querySelector('.tabulator-col-title');\r\n                                        if (colTitle) {\r\n                                            colTitle.style.setProperty('font-weight', HIGHLIGHT_STYLES.headerFontWeight, 'important');\r\n                                        }\r\n                                    });\r\n                                    \r\n                                    // Style group title - only font-weight, no background\r\n                                    const titleElement = colGroup.querySelector('.tabulator-col-title, .tab-group-title');\r\n                                    if (titleElement) {\r\n                                        titleElement.style.setProperty('font-weight', HIGHLIGHT_STYLES.headerFontWeight, 'important');\r\n                                    }\r\n                                }\r\n                            });\r\n                            \r\n                            // Strategy 2: Find columns by field attribute\r\n",

            "lineNumber": 992,

          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "                        if (highlightedFields.size \u003e 0) {\r\n                            // Strategy 1: Find groups by data-highlighted attribute in title\r\n                            header.querySelectorAll('.tabulator-col-group').forEach((colGroup, groupIndex) =\u003e {\r\n                                const groupTitle = colGroup.querySelector('.tab-group-title[data-highlighted=\"true\"]');\r\n                                if (groupTitle || highlightedGroupTitles.has(colGroup.getAttribute('aria-title') || '')) {\r\n                                    colGroup.classList.add('tab-group-highlighted');\r\n                                    \r\n                                    // Style all columns within this group\r\n                                    const cols = colGroup.querySelectorAll('.tabulator-col');\r\n                                    cols.forEach(col =\u003e {\r\n                                        col.classList.add('tab-col-highlighted');\r\n                                        const colTitle = col.querySelector('.tabulator-col-title');\r\n                                        if (colTitle) {\r\n                                            colTitle.style.setProperty('font-weight', HIGHLIGHT_STYLES.headerFontWeight, 'important');\r\n                                        }\r\n                                    });\r\n                                    \r\n                                    // Style group title - only font-weight, no background\r\n                                    const titleElement = colGroup.querySelector('.tabulator-col-title, .tab-group-title');\r\n                                    if (titleElement) {\r\n                                        titleElement.style.setProperty('font-weight', HIGHLIGHT_STYLES.headerFontWeight, 'important');\r\n                                    }\r\n                                }\r\n                            });\r\n                            \r\n                            // Strategy 2: Find columns by field attribute\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    // Check if data is already objects or arrays\r\n    const isArrayFormat = Array.isArray(data.data) \u0026\u0026 data.data.length \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 Array.isArray(data.data[0]);\r\n    \r\n    const transformedData = data.data.map((row, rowIndex) =\u003e {\r\n        const rowObject = { __rowIndex: rowIndex };\r\n        \r\n        if (isArrayFormat) {\r\n            // Transform array format: [val1, val2, ...] -\u003e {field1: val1, field2: val2, ...}\r\n            columnOrder.forEach((columnInfo, columnIndex) =\u003e {\r\n                rowObject[columnInfo.field] = row[columnIndex];\r\n            });\r\n        } else {\r\n            // Already object format: {field1: val1, field2: val2, ...} - use directly\r\n            columnOrder.forEach((columnInfo) =\u003e {\r\n                rowObject[columnInfo.field] = row[columnInfo.field];\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        if (rowMetadataMap[rowIndex]) {\r\n            rowObject.__rowMeta = rowMetadataMap[rowIndex];\r\n        }\r\n        return rowObject;\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    // Check if all group titles are empty - if so, flatten structure (no groups)\r\n    const hasGroupTitles = data.columns.some(group =\u003e group.title \u0026\u0026 group.title.trim() !== '');\r\n    \r\n    // Apply CSS classes for striped column groups before building column definitions\r\n    if (useStripedGroups \u0026\u0026 data.columns \u0026\u0026 hasGroupTitles) {\r\n        ColorUtils.assignGroupStripeCss(data.columns);\r\n        ColorUtils.injectStripeCss(data.columns.length, {\r\n            headerAlpha: isCompactLayout ? 0.55 : 0.4,\r\n            cellAlpha: 0.25\r\n        });\r\n    }\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "                            }\r\n                            \r\n                            // Structure 2: col-groups directly in header (alternative structure)\r\n                            // Check if column headers are children of col-groups or separate\r\n                            const colGroups = header.querySelectorAll('.tabulator-col-group');\r\n                            colGroups.forEach((colGroup, idx) =\u003e {\r\n                                const groupTitleEl = colGroup.querySelector('.tabulator-col-group-title');\r\n                                const titleText = groupTitleEl ? groupTitleEl.textContent.trim() : '';\r\n                                const columnHeaders = colGroup.querySelectorAll('.tabulator-col');\r\n                                \r\n                                if (titleText === '') {\r\n                                    if (columnHeaders.length \u003e 0) {\r\n                                        // Column headers ARE children of col-group - we can't hide the col-group\r\n                                        // Instead, hide only the title element and minimize the col-group height\r\n                                        if (groupTitleEl) {\r\n                                            groupTitleEl.style.setProperty('display', 'none', 'important');\r\n                                            groupTitleEl.style.setProperty('height', '0', 'important');\r\n                                        }\r\n                                        // Minimize col-group but keep it visible for column headers\r\n                                        colGroup.style.setProperty('min-height', '0', 'important');\r\n                                        colGroup.style.setProperty('padding-top', '0', 'important');\r\n                                        colGroup.style.setProperty('padding-bottom', '0', 'important');\r\n                                    ",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1187,
            "text": "                                });\r"
          },
          {
```

_**Agent (composer-1)**_


Updated the code to use the `DEFAULT_STRIPE_PALETTE` from `color-utils.js`:

1. **Exposed `DEFAULT_STRIPE_PALETTE`** in the `ColorUtils` object so it can be accessed externally
2. **Updated the striping code** in `tables.html` to explicitly use `ColorUtils.DEFAULT_STRIPE_PALETTE` when calling `injectStripeCss`

The `injectStripeCss` function already defaults to `DEFAULT_STRIPE_PALETTE` (`["#ffffff", "#999999"]`), but passing it explicitly ensures it uses the correct palette from `color-utils.js`.

Refresh the page and the column group striping should use the colors defined in `color-utils.js`. The striping alternates between white (`#ffffff`) and gray (`#999999`) with the specified alpha values for headers and cells.

---

```json
        "contents": "class TeamPerformanceBlock {\n\r\n\r\n    ...\n\r\n\r\n    renderWinPercentageBubbleChart(data) {\r\n        const chartContainer = document.getElementById('team-win-percentage-chart-bubble');\r\n        if (!chartContainer) {\r\n            console.error('Win percentage bubble chart container not found');\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        if (typeof createScatterChartMultiAxis !== 'function') {\r\n            console.error('createScatterChartMultiAxis function not available');\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Extract data from SeriesData format\r\n        const winPercentageData = data.win_percentage_data;\r\n        const labels = data.weeks;\r\n        const teamKey = &#96;${data.team} (Team)&#96;;\r\n        \r\n        // Ensure player colors are set - normalize player names (trim whitespace)\r\n        const playerNames = Object.keys(winPercentageData.data)\r\n            .map(name =\u003e String(name).trim())\r\n            .filter(name =\u003e name !== teamKey);\r\n        if (window.updatePlayerColorMap \u0026\u0026 playerNames.length \u003e 0) {\r\n            window.updatePlayerColorMap(playerNames);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Convert SeriesData format to scatter chart format\r\n        const chartData = {};\r\n        \r\n        // Process each player/team in the win percentage data\r\n        Object.keys(winPercentageData.data).forEach(playerName =\u003e {\r\n            const playerData = winPercentageData.data[playerName];\r\n            // Filter out null/undefined values for chart display\r\n            chartData[playerName] = playerData.map(value =\u003e \r\n                value === null || value === undefined ? null : value\r\n            );\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        // Generate week labels\r\n        const weekLabel = typeof t === 'function' ? t('week', 'Week') : 'Week';\r\n        const weekLabels = labels.map((week, index) =\u003e &#96;${weekLabel} ${index + 1}&#96;);",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    renderWinPercentageBubbleChart(data) {\r\n        const chartContainer = document.getElementById('team-win-percentage-chart-bubble');\r\n        if (!chartContainer) {\r\n            console.error('Win percentage bubble chart container not found');\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        if (typeof createScatterChartMultiAxis !== 'function') {\r\n            console.error('createScatterChartMultiAxis function not available');\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // Extract data from SeriesData format\r\n        const winPercentageData = data.win_percentage_data;\r\n        const labels = data.weeks;\r\n        const teamKey = &#96;${data.team} (Team)&#96;;\r\n        \r\n        // Ensure player colors are set - normalize player names (trim whitespace)\r\n        const playerNames = Object.keys(winPercentageData.data)\r\n            .map(name =\u003e String(name).trim())\r\n            .filter(name =\u003e name !== teamKey);\r\n        if (window.updatePlayerColorMap \u0026\u0026 playerNames.length \u003e 0) {\r\n            window.updatePlayerColorMap(playerNames);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Convert SeriesData format to scatter chart format\r\n        const chartData = {};\r\n        \r\n        // Process each player/team in the win percentage data\r\n        Object.keys(winPercentageData.data).forEach(playerName =\u003e {\r\n            const playerData = winPercentageData.data[playerName];\r\n            // Filter out null/undefined values for chart display\r\n            chartData[playerName] = playerData.map(value =\u003e \r\n                value === null || value === undefined ? null : value\r\n            );\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        // Generate week labels\r\n        const weekLabel = typeof t === 'function' ? t('week', 'Week') : 'Week';\r\n        const weekLabels = labels.map((week, index) =\u003e &#96;${weekLabel} ${index + 1}&#96;);",

        "contents": "\r\n    // Extract normalization options with defaults\r\n    const {\r\n        minValue = null,        // Minimum value bound (null = auto from data)\r\n        maxValue = null,        // Maximum value bound (null = auto from data)\r\n        minCircleSize = 7,     // Minimum circle size in pixels\r\n        maxCircleSize = 45,     // Maximum circle size in pixels\r\n        hideNaValues = true     // Hide circles for null/undefined values (n/a = no participation)\r\n    } = options;\r\n    \r\n    // Debug logging\r\n    console.log('createScatterChartMultiAxis options:', {\r\n        minValue,\r\n        maxValue,\r\n        minCircleSize,\r\n        maxCircleSize,\r\n        hideNaValues,\r\n        receivedOptions: options\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    // Dispose of existing chart instance if it exists\r\n    const existingChart = echarts.getInstanceByDom(container);\r\n    if (existingChart) {\r\n        existingChart.dispose();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Initialize new chart instance\r\n    const chart = echarts.init(container, null, {\r\n        devicePixelRatio: window.devicePixelRatio,\r\n        renderer: 'canvas'\r\n    });\r\n    \r\n    const teams = order;\r\n    const singleAxis = [];\r\n    const series = [];\r\n    \r\n    // Calculate value bounds if not provided\r\n    let valueMin = minValue;\r\n    let valueMax = maxValue;\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    // Extract normalization options with defaults\r\n    const {\r\n        minValue = null,        // Minimum value bound (null = auto from data)\r\n        maxValue = null,        // Maximum value bound (null = auto from data)\r\n        minCircleSize = 7,     // Minimum circle size in pixels\r\n        maxCircleSize = 45,     // Maximum circle size in pixels\r\n        hideNaValues = true     // Hide circles for null/undefined values (n/a = no participation)\r\n    } = options;\r\n    \r\n    // Debug logging\r\n    console.log('createScatterChartMultiAxis options:', {\r\n        minValue,\r\n        maxValue,\r\n        minCircleSize,\r\n        maxCircleSize,\r\n        hideNaValues,\r\n        receivedOptions: options\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    // Dispose of existing chart instance if it exists\r\n    const existingChart = echarts.getInstanceByDom(container);\r\n    if (existingChart) {\r\n        existingChart.dispose();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Initialize new chart instance\r\n    const chart = echarts.init(container, null, {\r\n        devicePixelRatio: window.devicePixelRatio,\r\n        renderer: 'canvas'\r\n    });\r\n    \r\n    const teams = order;\r\n    const singleAxis = [];\r\n    const series = [];\r\n    \r\n    // Calculate value bounds if not provided\r\n    let valueMin = minValue;\r\n    let valueMax = maxValue;\r\n",

        "contents": "}\r\n            ]\r\n        };\r\n\r\n        window.trendChart = new Chart(ctx, {\r\n            type: 'bubble',\r\n            data: chartData,\r\n            options: {\r\n                responsive: true,\r\n                maintainAspectRatio: false,\r\n                scales: {\r\n                    x: {\r\n                        type: 'category',\r\n                        title: {\r\n                            display: true,\r\n                            text: 'Season'\r\n                        }\r\n                    },\r\n                    y: {\r\n                        title: {\r\n                            display: true,\r\n                            text: 'Average Score'\r\n                        },\r\n                        beginAtZero: false\r\n                    }\r\n                },\r\n                plugins: {\r\n                    tooltip: {\r\n                        callbacks: {\r\n                            label: function(context) {\r\n                                const dataIndex = context.dataIndex;\r\n                                if (context.dataset.label === 'Season Average') {\r\n                                    return [\r\n                                        &#96;Average: ${(data.seasons[dataIndex]?.average || 0).toFixed(1)}&#96;,\r\n                                        &#96;Games: ${data.seasons[dataIndex]?.games || 0}&#96;\r\n                                    ];\r\n                                }\r\n                                return &#96;All-Time Average: ${(data.lifetime?.average_score || 0).toFixed(1)}&#96;;\r\n                            }\r\n                        }\r\n                    },\r\n                    legend: {\r\n                        display: true,\r\n                        position: 'top'\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n    }\r\n});\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n{% endblock %} ",

        "originalContents": "}\r\n            ]\r\n        };\r\n\r\n        window.trendChart = new Chart(ctx, {\r\n            type: 'bubble',\r\n            data: chartData,\r\n            options: {\r\n                responsive: true,\r\n                maintainAspectRatio: false,\r\n                scales: {\r\n                    x: {\r\n                        type: 'category',\r\n                        title: {\r\n                            display: true,\r\n                            text: 'Season'\r\n                        }\r\n                    },\r\n                    y: {\r\n                        title: {\r\n                            display: true,\r\n                            text: 'Average Score'\r\n                        },\r\n                        beginAtZero: false\r\n                    }\r\n                },\r\n                plugins: {\r\n                    tooltip: {\r\n                        callbacks: {\r\n                            label: function(context) {\r\n                                const dataIndex = context.dataIndex;\r\n                                if (context.dataset.label === 'Season Average') {\r\n                                    return [\r\n                                        &#96;Average: ${(data.seasons[dataIndex]?.average || 0).toFixed(1)}&#96;,\r\n                                        &#96;Games: ${data.seasons[dataIndex]?.games || 0}&#96;\r\n                                    ];\r\n                                }\r\n                                return &#96;All-Time Average: ${(data.lifetime?.average_score || 0).toFixed(1)}&#96;;\r\n                            }\r\n                        }\r\n                    },\r\n                    legend: {\r\n                        display: true,\r\n                        position: 'top'\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n    }\r\n});\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n{% endblock %} ",

        "contents": "\r\n    // Chart options\r\n    const chartOptions = {\r\n        title: {\r\n            text: title,\r\n            left: 'center',\r\n            top: 10\r\n        },\r\n        tooltip: {\r\n            trigger: 'axis',\r\n            axisPointer: {\r\n                type: 'shadow'\r\n            },\r\n            formatter: function(params) {\r\n                const opponent = opponents[params[0].dataIndex];\r\n                const wins = params[0].value;\r\n                const losses = Math.abs(params[1].value);\r\n                const total = wins + losses;\r\n                const winRate = total \u003e 0 ? ((wins / total) * 100).toFixed(1) : 0;\r\n                \r\n                return &#96;${opponent}\u003cbr/\u003e\r\n                        Wins: ${wins}\u003cbr/\u003e\r\n                        Losses: ${losses}\u003cbr/\u003e\r\n                        Total: ${total}\u003cbr/\u003e\r\n                        Win Rate: ${winRate}%&#96;;\r\n            }\r\n        },\r\n        legend: {\r\n            show: true,\r\n            top: 40,\r\n            data: ['Wins', 'Losses']\r\n        },\r\n                 grid: {\r\n             top: '25%',\r\n             right: '10%',\r\n             bottom: '10%',\r\n             left: '10%',\r\n             containLabel: true\r\n         },\r\n        xAxis: {\r\n            type: 'value',\r\n            axisLine: {\r\n                show: true,\r\n                lineStyle: {\r\n                    color: '#333'\r\n                }\r\n            },\r\n            axisTick: {\r\n                show: false\r\n            },\r\n            axisLabel: {\r\n                show: true,\r\n                formatter: function(value) {\r\n                    return Math.abs(value);\r\n                }\r\n            },\r\n            splitLine: {\r\n                show: true,\r\n                lineStyle: {\r\n                    type: 'dashed',\r\n                    color: '#ccc'\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        },\r\n                 yAxis: {\r\n             ",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    // Chart options\r\n    const chartOptions = {\r\n        title: {\r\n            text: title,\r\n            left: 'center',\r\n            top: 10\r\n        },\r\n        tooltip: {\r\n            trigger: 'axis',\r\n            axisPointer: {\r\n                type: 'shadow'\r\n            },\r\n            formatter: function(params) {\r\n                const opponent = opponents[params[0].dataIndex];\r\n                const wins = params[0].value;\r\n                const losses = Math.abs(params[1].value);\r\n                const total = wins + losses;\r\n                const winRate = total \u003e 0 ? ((wins / total) * 100).toFixed(1) : 0;\r\n                \r\n                return &#96;${opponent}\u003cbr/\u003e\r\n                        Wins: ${wins}\u003cbr/\u003e\r\n                        Losses: ${losses}\u003cbr/\u003e\r\n                        Total: ${total}\u003cbr/\u003e\r\n                        Win Rate: ${winRate}%&#96;;\r\n            }\r\n        },\r\n        legend: {\r\n            show: true,\r\n            top: 40,\r\n            data: ['Wins', 'Losses']\r\n        },\r\n                 grid: {\r\n             top: '25%',\r\n             right: '10%',\r\n             bottom: '10%',\r\n             left: '10%',\r\n             containLabel: true\r\n         },\r\n        xAxis: {\r\n            type: 'value',\r\n            axisLine: {\r\n                show: true,\r\n                lineStyle: {\r\n                    color: '#333'\r\n                }\r\n            },\r\n            axisTick: {\r\n                show: false\r\n            },\r\n            axisLabel: {\r\n                show: true,\r\n                formatter: function(value) {\r\n                    return Math.abs(value);\r\n                }\r\n            },\r\n            splitLine: {\r\n                show: true,\r\n                lineStyle: {\r\n                    type: 'dashed',\r\n                    color: '#ccc'\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        },\r\n                 yAxis: {\r\n             ",

        "contents": "\r\n    // Chart options\r\n    const chartOptions = {\r\n        title: {\r\n            text: title,\r\n            left: 'center',\r\n            top: 10\r\n        },\r\n        tooltip: {\r\n            trigger: 'axis',\r\n            axisPointer: {\r\n                type: 'shadow'\r\n            },\r\n            formatter: function(params) {\r\n                const dataIndex = params[0].dataIndex;\r\n                const label = labels[dataIndex];\r\n                const value = params[0].value;\r\n                \r\n                if (value \u003e 0) {\r\n                    return &#96;${label}\u003cbr/\u003eNet Wins: +${value}&#96;;\r\n                } else if (value \u003c 0) {\r\n                    return &#96;${label}\u003cbr/\u003eNet Losses: ${value}&#96;;\r\n                } else {\r\n                    return &#96;${label}\u003cbr/\u003eEven: 0&#96;;\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        },\r\n        legend: {\r\n            show: false\r\n        },\r\n        grid: {\r\n            top: '15%',\r\n            right: '10%',\r\n            bottom: '10%',\r\n            left: '10%',\r\n            containLabel: true\r\n        },\r\n        xAxis: {\r\n            type: 'value',\r\n            position: 'center',\r\n            axisLine: {\r\n                show: true,\r\n                lineStyle: {\r\n                    color: '#333'\r\n                }\r\n            },\r\n            axisTick: {\r\n                show: false\r\n            },\r\n            axisLabel: {\r\n                show: true,\r\n                formatter: function(value) {\r\n                    return value \u003e= 0 ? &#96;+${value}&#96; : &#96;${value}&#96;;\r\n                }\r\n            },\r\n            splitLine: {\r\n                show: true,\r\n                lineStyle: {\r\n                    type: 'dashed',\r\n                    color: '#ccc'\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        },\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    // Chart options\r\n    const chartOptions = {\r\n        title: {\r\n            text: title,\r\n            left: 'center',\r\n            top: 10\r\n        },\r\n        tooltip: {\r\n            trigger: 'axis',\r\n            axisPointer: {\r\n                type: 'shadow'\r\n            },\r\n            formatter: function(params) {\r\n                const dataIndex = params[0].dataIndex;\r\n                const label = labels[dataIndex];\r\n                const value = params[0].value;\r\n                \r\n                if (value \u003e 0) {\r\n                    return &#96;${label}\u003cbr/\u003eNet Wins: +${value}&#96;;\r\n                } else if (value \u003c 0) {\r\n                    return &#96;${label}\u003cbr/\u003eNet Losses: ${value}&#96;;\r\n                } else {\r\n                    return &#96;${label}\u003cbr/\u003eEven: 0&#96;;\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        },\r\n        legend: {\r\n            show: false\r\n        },\r\n        grid: {\r\n            top: '15%',\r\n            right: '10%',\r\n            bottom: '10%',\r\n            left: '10%',\r\n            containLabel: true\r\n        },\r\n        xAxis: {\r\n            type: 'value',\r\n            position: 'center',\r\n            axisLine: {\r\n                show: true,\r\n                lineStyle: {\r\n                    color: '#333'\r\n                }\r\n            },\r\n            axisTick: {\r\n                show: false\r\n            },\r\n            axisLabel: {\r\n                show: true,\r\n                formatter: function(value) {\r\n                    return value \u003e= 0 ?
```
