<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="search_replace">

<details><summary>Tool use: **search_replace** • Edit file: app/static/js/content-blocks/team-performance-block.js</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 103, lines removed: 0

```diff
@@ -431,4 +431,107 @@
          );
      }
+ 
+     storeColumnMetadata(tableData) {
+         // Extract all column fields and categorize them
+         this.columnMetadata = {
+             allFields: [],
+             pointsFields: [],
+             scoreFields: [],
+             otherFields: []
+         };
+ 
+         if (!tableData.columns) {
+             return;
+         }
+ 
+         // Flatten column structure to get all fields
+         const flattenColumns = (columns) =&gt; {
+             const fields = [];
+             columns.forEach((group) =&gt; {
+                 if (group.columns &amp;&amp; Array.isArray(group.columns)) {
+                     group.columns.forEach((col) =&gt; {
+                         if (col.field) {
+                             fields.push(col.field);
+                         }
+                     });
+                 }
+             });
+             return fields;
+         };
+ 
+         const allFields = flattenColumns(tableData.columns);
+         this.columnMetadata.allFields = allFields;
+ 
+         // Categorize fields: points vs score
+         allFields.forEach((field) =&gt; {
+             const fieldLower = field.toLowerCase();
+             // Check for points first (to catch avg_points, etc.)
+             if (fieldLower.includes('points')) {
+                 this.columnMetadata.pointsFields.push(field);
+             } else if (fieldLower.includes('score') || fieldLower.startsWith('week_')) {
+                 // Score fields: anything with "score" or week columns (week_1, week_2, etc.)
+                 this.columnMetadata.scoreFields.push(field);
+             } else {
+                 // Other fields (player_name, player_initials, totals, etc.) - always show
+                 this.columnMetadata.otherFields.push(field);
+             }
+         });
+     }
+ 
+     attachFilterListeners() {
+         // Listen for filter button changes
+         this.container.addEventListener('change', (event) =&gt; {
+             if (event.target.name === 'performanceFilter') {
+                 this.currentFilter = event.target.value;
+                 this.applyFilter(this.currentFilter);
+             }
+         });
+     }
+ 
+     applyFilter(filterType) {
+         const tableInstance = window['team-performance-tableInstance'];
+         if (!tableInstance || !this.columnMetadata) {
+             return;
+         }
+ 
+         const { pointsFields, scoreFields, otherFields } = this.columnMetadata;
+ 
+         // Determine which fields to show
+         let fieldsToShow = [];
+         let fieldsToHide = [];
+ 
+         if (filterType === 'points') {
+             fieldsToShow = [...pointsFields, ...otherFields];
+             fieldsToHide = scoreFields;
+         } else if (filterType === 'score') {
+             fieldsToShow = [...scoreFields, ...otherFields];
+             fieldsToHide = pointsFields;
+         } else {
+             // 'both' - show all
+             fieldsToShow = [...pointsFields, ...scoreFields, ...otherFields];
+             fieldsToHide = [];
+         }
+ 
+         // Apply show/hide to columns
+         try {
+             // Get all columns from Tabulator
+             const allColumns = tableInstance.getColumns();
+             
+             allColumns.forEach((column) =&gt; {
+                 const field = column.getField();
+                 if (!field) {
+                     return; // Skip group headers
+                 }
+ 
+                 if (fieldsToHide.includes(field)) {
+                     column.hide();
+                 } else if (fieldsToShow.includes(field)) {
+                     column.show();
+                 }
+             });
+         } catch (error) {
+             console.error('Error applying filter:', error);
+         }
+     }
  
      renderError(message) {
```

_**Agent (composer-1)**_


## Summary

Added filter buttons ("Points", "Score", "Both") to the performance table card header in the LST view.

**Changes made:**

1. **Added filter buttons** to the card header (same pattern as "Classic"/"New" in SLWT view):
   - Three radio buttons: "Points", "Score", "Both"
   - Styled with Bootstrap `btn-group` and `btn-outline-primary btn-sm`
   - Positioned on the right side of the card header

2. **Implemented filtering logic**:
   - `storeColumnMetadata()`: Categorizes columns into points fields, score fields, and other fields (always visible)
   - `attachFilterListeners()`: Listens for filter button changes
   - `applyFilter()`: Uses Tabulator's `hide()`/`show()` to filter columns based on field names

3. **Column categorization**:
   - Points fields: any field containing "points" (e.g., `avg_points`, `points`)
   - Score fields: any field containing "score" or starting with "week_" (e.g., `avg_score`, `week_1`, `week_2`)
   - Other fields: always visible (e.g., `player_name`, `player_initials`, totals)

4. **Translation support**: Added "both" translation key to i18n service

The filter works on the frontend by hiding/showing columns in the existing table instance, without fetching new data or changing routes. The filter state persists while the table is visible and resets when the table is re-rendered.

---

```json
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    generateHTML(state) {\r\n        const matchDayText = window.translations ? \r\n            (window.translations['match_day'] || 'Match Day') : \r\n            'Match Day';\r\n\r\n        return &#96;\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv class=\"card\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003cdiv class=\"card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center\"\u003e\r\n                            \u003cdiv\u003e\r\n                            \u003ch5\u003e${typeof t === 'function' ? t('block.team_details.title', 'Score Sheet for Selected Team') : 'Score Sheet for Selected Team'}\u003c/h5\u003e    \r\n                                \u003cdiv id=\"teamDetailsMetadata\" class=\"text-muted small\"\u003e\r\n                                    ${state.team} - ${matchDayText} ${state.week}\r\n                                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                            \u003cdiv class=\"btn-group\" role=\"group\" aria-label=\"View options\"\u003e\r\n                                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"teamView\" id=\"teamViewClassic\" value=\"classic\" checked\u003e\r\n                                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm\" for=\"teamViewClassic\"\u003e${typeof t === 'function' ? t('block.team_details.view.classic', 'Classic') : 'Classic'}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"teamView\" id=\"teamViewNew\" value=\"new\"\u003e\r\n                                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm\" for=\"teamViewNew\"\u003e${typeof t === 'function' ? t('block.team_details.view.new', 'New') : 'New'}",

        \r\n            // Check if clicked element is a radio button filter\r\n            if (radioInput \u0026\u0026 radioInput.type === 'radio' \u0026\u0026 ['season', 'week'].includes(radioInput.name)) {\r\n                const buttonName = radioInput.name;\r\n                const buttonValue = radioInput.value;\r\n                const currentlySelected = this.selectedButtons.get(buttonName);\r\n                \r\n                console.log(&#96;🔍 TeamStats: Click detected on ${buttonName} button: ${buttonValue}, currently selected: ${currentlySelected}&#96;);\r\n                \r\n                // Check if clicking the same button that was already selected\r\n                if (currentlySelected === buttonValue) {\r\n                    console.log(&#96;🎯 TeamStats: Deselecting ${buttonName}: ${buttonValue}&#96;);\r\n                    \r\n                    // Prevent the default radio button behavior by unchecking it\r\n                    event.preventDefault();\r\n                    event.stopPropagation();\r\n                    radioInput.checked = false;\r\n                    \r\n                    // Update our tracking map\r\n                    this.selectedButtons.delete(buttonName);\r\n                    \r\n                    // Trigger the appropriate state update for deselection\r\n                    if (buttonName === 'season') {\r\n                        console.log('📅 Season deselected');\r\n                        this.setState({ season: '', week: '' });\r\n                    } else if (buttonName === 'week') {\r\n                        console.log('📆 Week deselected');\r\n                        this.setState({ week: '' });\r\n                    }\r\n                    \r\n                    return;\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // If this is not a deselection, the change event will handle updating the tracking\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        console.log('✅ All event listeners set up');\r\n    }",

        "contents": "class CentralizedButtonManager {\n    ...\n    setupButtonEventListeners() {\n\r\n        \r\n        ...\n\r\n        \r\n        // Add click event listeners for deselection functionality\r\n        document.addEventListener('click', (event) =\u003e {\r\n            let target = event.target;\r\n            \r\n            // Find the radio input if clicking on label\r\n            if (target.tagName === 'LABEL' \u0026\u0026 target.htmlFor) {\r\n                const radioInput = document.getElementById(target.htmlFor);\r\n                if (radioInput \u0026\u0026 radioInput.type === 'radio') {\r\n                    target = radioInput;\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            if (target.type === 'radio' \u0026\u0026 this.buttonGroups[target.name]) {\r\n                const groupName = target.name;\r\n                const value = target.value;\r\n                const currentlySelected = this.selectedValues[groupName];\r\n                \r\n                // Check if clicking the same button that was already selected\r\n                if (currentlySelected === value) {\r\n                    console.log(&#96;🎯 CentralizedButtonManager: Deselecting ${groupName}: ${value}&#96;);\r\n                    \r\n                    // Prevent the default radio button behavior\r\n                    event.preventDefault();\r\n                    event.stopPropagation();\r\n                    target.checked = false;\r\n                    \r\n                    // Clear selection and update state\r\n                    this.selectedValues[groupName] = '';\r\n                    if (groupName === 'league') {\r\n                        this.selectedValues.league_long = '';\r\n                        this.urlStateManager.setState({ league: '', league_long: '' });\r\n                    } else {\r\n                        this.urlStateManager.setState({ [groupName]: '' });\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n        \r\n        // Add click event listeners for deselection functionality\r\n        document.addEventListener('click', (event) =\u003e {\r\n            let target = event.target;\r\n            \r\n            // Find the radio input if clicking on label\r\n            if (target.tagName === 'LABEL' \u0026\u0026 target.htmlFor) {\r\n                const radioInput = document.getElementById(target.htmlFor);\r\n                if (radioInput \u0026\u0026 radioInput.type === 'radio') {\r\n                    target = radioInput;\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            if (target.type === 'radio' \u0026\u0026 this.buttonGroups[target.name]) {\r\n                const groupName = target.name;\r\n                const value = target.value;\r\n                const currentlySelected = this.selectedValues[groupName];\r\n                \r\n                // Check if clicking the same button that was already selected\r\n                if (currentlySelected === value) {\r\n                    console.log(&#96;🎯 CentralizedButtonManager: Deselecting ${groupName}: ${value}&#96;);\r\n                    \r\n                    // Prevent the default radio button behavior\r\n                    event.preventDefault();\r\n                    event.stopPropagation();\r\n                    target.checked = false;\r\n                    \r\n                    // Clear selection and update state\r\n                    this.selectedValues[groupName] = '';\r\n                    if (groupName === 'league') {\r\n                        this.selectedValues.league_long = '';\r\n                        this.urlStateManager.setState({ league: '', league_long: '' });\r\n                    } else {\r\n                        this.urlStateManager.setState({ [groupName]: '' });\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n    }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {

          }

        "contents": "class LeagueStatsApp {\n    ...\n    async initializeContentBlocks() {\n\r\n            ...\n\r\n            this.contentBlocks.set('team-performance', teamPerformanceBlock);\r\n            this.contentBlocks.set('game-overview', gameOverviewBlock);\r\n            this.contentBlocks.set('game-team-details', gameTeamDetailsBlock);\r\n            \r\n            console.log('✅ Content blocks initialized');\r\n            \r\n            // Initialize centralized button manager for league mode with content rendering callback\r\n            this.buttonManager = new CentralizedButtonManager(this.urlStateManager, 'league', (state) =\u003e {\r\n                console.log('🔄 LeagueStatsApp: Button state changed, rendering content:', state);\r\n                console.log('🔄 LeagueStatsApp: State keys:', Object.keys(state));\r\n                console.log('🔄 LeagueStatsApp: Round value:', state.round, 'Type:', typeof state.round);\r\n                this.currentState = { ...state };\r\n                this.renderContent();\r\n            });\r\n            await this.buttonManager.initialize();\r\n            \r\n        } catch (error) {\r\n            console.error('❌ Error initializing content blocks:', error);\r\n            throw error;\r\n        }\r\n    }",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n/**\n * Update team buttons\n */\nfunction updateTeamButtons() {\n    if (!currentState.season || !currentState.league || !currentState.week) {\n        // Clear team buttons if prerequisites not met\n        const container = document.getElementById('buttonsTeam');\n        if (container) {\n            container.innerHTML = &#96;\u003cspan class=\"text-muted\"\u003e${typeof t === 'function' ? t('msg.please_select.match_day', 'Please select a match day.') : 'Please select a match day.'}\u003c/span\u003e&#96;;\n        }\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    fetchWithDatabase(&#96;/league/get_available_teams?season=${currentState.season}\u0026league=${currentState.league}&#96;)\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\n        .then(teams =\u003e {\n            const teamButtons = teams.map(team =\u003e &#96;\n                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"team\" id=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\" \n                       value=\"${team}\" ${team === currentState.team ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/label\u003e\n            &#96;).join('');\n            document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = teamButtons;\n            \n            // Select first team by default if none selected\n            let teamInput = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked');\n            if (!teamInput \u0026\u0026 teams.length \u003e 0) {\n                teamInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"team\"][value=\"${teams[0]}\"]&#96;);\n                if (teamInput) {\n                    teamInput.checked = true;\n                    currentState.team = teams[0];\n                }\n            }\n        })\n        .catch",

'checked' : ''}\u003e\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/label\u003e\n            &#96;).join('');\n            document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = teamButtons;\n            \n            // Select first team by default if none selected\n            let teamInput = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked');\n            if (!teamInput \u0026\u0026 teams.length \u003e 0) {\n                teamInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"team\"][value=\"${teams[0]}\"]&#96;);\n                if (teamInput) {\n                    teamInput.checked = true;\n                    currentState.team = teams[0];\n                }\n            }\n        })\n        .catch",

        "contents": "function updateTeamSelect(teams) {\n\r\n\r\n    ...\n\r\n\r\n    // Add event listener to new select\r\n    newSelect.addEventListener('change', function() {\r\n        const selectedTeam = this.value;\r\n        console.log('Selected team (legacy):', selectedTeam);\r\n        if (selectedTeam) {\r\n            updateSeasonButtons(selectedTeam);\r\n            updateMessageVisibility();\r\n            updateTeamHistory(selectedTeam);\r\n    \r\n            updateLeagueComparison(selectedTeam);\r\n            loadSpecialMatches(selectedTeam);\r\n            \r\n            // Also trigger modern analysis if a season is already selected\r\n            const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n            if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedSeason !== '') {\r\n                // Team + specific season selected\r\n                console.log('Team + specific season selected');\r\n                updateClutchAnalysis(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                updateConsistencyMetrics(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n                loadSpecialMatchesForSeason(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);\r\n            } else {\r\n                // Team only selected (season = \"All\")\r\n                console.log('Team only selected (All seasons)');\r\n                updateClutchAnalysis(selectedTeam, null);\r\n                updateConsistencyMetrics(selectedTeam, null);\r\n                loadSpecialMatches(selectedTeam);\r\n            }\r\n        } else {\r\n            // No team selected - show all teams stats\r\n            console.log('No team selected - show all teams');\r\n            updateAllTeamsStats();\r\n            updateMessageVisibility();\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n}",
```

```diff
      attachFilterListeners() {
-         // Listen for filter button changes
-         this.container.addEventListener('change', (event) =&gt; {
+         // Use event delegation on document to catch events from dynamically created buttons
+         // Remove any existing listener first to avoid duplicates
+         if (this._filterListener) {
+             document.removeEventListener('change', this._filterListener);
+         }
+         
+         this._filterListener = (event) =&gt; {
              if (event.target.name === 'performanceFilter') {
                  this.currentFilter = event.target.value;
+                 console.log('Filter changed to:', this.currentFilter);
                  this.applyFilter(this.currentFilter);
              }
-         });
+         };
+         
+         document.addEventListener('change', this._filterListener);
+         
+         // Also set the default checked state visually
+         const defaultButton = document.getElementById('performanceFilterBoth');
+         if (defaultButton) {
+             defaultButton.checked = true;
+         }
      }
```

```diff
              const scoreButton = document.getElementById('performanceFilterScore');
              
-             console.log('Filter buttons found:', {

+                 console.warn('⚠️ Filter buttons not found in DOM!');
+                 return;
+             }
+             
+             // Set default checked state
+             defaultButton.checked = true;
+             this.currentFilter = 'both';
+             
+             // Ensure visual state is correct
+             const labels = document.querySelectorAll('label[for^="performanceFilter"]');
+             labels.forEach(label =&gt; {
+                 const inputId = label.getAttribute('for');
+                 const input = document.getElementById(inputId);
+                 if (input &amp;&amp; input.checked) {
                      label.classList.add('active');
+                 } else {
+                     label.classList.remove('active');
                  }
-             }
+             });
+             
+             console.log('✅ Filter buttons initialized, default filter:', this.currentFilter);
          }, 100);
      }
```

_**Agent (composer-1)**_


Added debugging to verify the buttons render. The console logs will show:
1. Whether the buttons exist in the DOM
2. The default filter setting
3. When the filter changes

**Summary of changes:**
1. Added console logging to verify buttons are found in the DOM
2. Improved default filter initialization with visual state updates
3. Added warnings if buttons aren't found

**To debug:**
1. Open the browser console
2. Navigate to the LST view with a team selected
3. Check the console for:
   - "Filter buttons check" — shows if buttons were found
   - "Filter buttons initialized" — confirms default filter is set
   - "Applying default filter" — shows when filter is applied

**Default setting:** The default filter is `'both'`, which shows all columns (both points and score columns). This is set in the constructor (`this.currentFilter = 'both'`) and the "Both" button is marked as `checked` in the HTML.

If the buttons still don't appear, check:
- Bootstrap CSS is loaded (buttons use Bootstrap classes)
- The card header HTML is rendering correctly
- No CSS is hiding the buttons

The console logs will help identify where the issue is.

---

_**Agent (composer-1)**_


Logs show no team is selected (`team: ''`), so the block is hidden and the buttons won't appear. The buttons only render when a team is selected.

Added debugging to verify:
1. Buttons exist in the DOM after HTML is rendered
2. Default filter is applied correctly
3. Filter buttons are initialized

**To test:**
1. Select a team from the team buttons
2. Check the browser console for:
   - "TeamPerformanceBlock: Buttons check after HTML render" — confirms buttons exist
   - "Filter buttons check" — shows button initialization
   - "Applying default filter" — shows when filter is applied

**Default setting:** The default is `'both'` (shows all columns). This is set:
- In the constructor: `this.currentFilter = 'both'`
- In the HTML: the "Both" radio button has `checked` attribute
- When the table loads: the filter is applied automatically

If the buttons still don't appear after selecting a team, check:
- Bootstrap CSS is loaded (buttons use Bootstrap classes)
- The card header is visible
- No CSS is hiding the buttons

Select a team and check the console logs to see what's happening.

```json
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "            \u003cdiv class=\"card mb-3\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eget_team_season_performance\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003csmall class=\"text-muted\"\u003e/team/get_team_season_performance\u003c/small\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv class=\"mb-3 d-flex align-items-center\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003cbutton class=\"btn btn-primary me-2\" onclick=\"testTeamSeasonPerformance()\"\u003eTest Route\u003c/button\u003e\r\n                        \u003cspan id=\"teamSeasonPerformanceTime\" class=\"text-muted\"\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"teamSeasonPerformanceResult\" class=\"result-container\"\u003e\r\n       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\n{% block content %}\n    {% include \"components/tables.html\" %}\n    {% include \"components/charts.html\" %}\n\n    \u003cstyle\u003e\n        /* Ensure Bootstrap button styling works properly */\n        .btn-check:checked + .btn-outline-primary {\n            background-color: var(--theme-primary, #0d6efd) !important;\n            border-color: var(--theme-primary, #0d6efd) !important;\n            color: white !important;\n        }\n        \n        .btn-check:focus + .btn-outline-primary {\n            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.25rem rgba(13, 110, 253, 0.25) !important;\n        }\n    \u003c/style\u003e\n\n    \u003c!-- Selection Message --\u003e\n    \u003cdiv id=\"selectionMessage\" class=\"alert alert-danger fs-4\"\u003e\n        Bitte wählen Sie ein Team.\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\n    \u003c!-- Filter Controls --\u003e\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\n            \u003ch4\u003eTeam Statistics\u003c/h4\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\n            \u003c!-- Selection Area --\u003e\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-3\"\u003e\n                    \u003ch5\u003eTeam\u003c/h5\u003e\n                    \u003cselect id=\"teamSelect\" class=\"form-select\"\u003e\n                        \u003coption value=\"\"\u003eBitte wählen...\u003c/option\u003e\n                    \u003c/select\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-9\"\u003e\n                    \u003ch5\u003eSaison\u003c/h5\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsSeason\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\n                        \u003c!-- Seasons will be inserted here --\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n",

        "originalContents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\n{% block content %}\n    {% include \"components/tables.html\" %}\n    {% include \"components/charts.html\" %}\n\n    \u003cstyle\u003e\n        /* Ensure Bootstrap button styling works properly */\n        .btn-check:checked + .btn-outline-primary {\n            background-color: var(--theme-primary, #0d6efd) !important;\n            border-color: var(--theme-primary, #0d6efd) !important;\n            color: white !important;\n        }\n        \n        .btn-check:focus + .btn-outline-primary {\n            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.25rem rgba(13, 110, 253, 0.25) !important;\n        }\n    \u003c/style\u003e\n\n    \u003c!-- Selection Message --\u003e\n    \u003cdiv id=\"selectionMessage\" class=\"alert alert-danger fs-4\"\u003e\n        Bitte wählen Sie ein Team.\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\n    \u003c!-- Filter Controls --\u003e\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\n            \u003ch4\u003eTeam Statistics\u003c/h4\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\n            \u003c!-- Selection Area --\u003e\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-3\"\u003e\n                    \u003ch5\u003eTeam\u003c/h5\u003e\n                    \u003cselect id=\"teamSelect\" class=\"form-select\"\u003e\n                        \u003coption value=\"\"\u003eBitte wählen...\u003c/option\u003e\n                    \u003c/select\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-9\"\u003e\n                    \u003ch5\u003eSaison\u003c/h5\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsSeason\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\n                        \u003c!-- Seasons will be inserted here --\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center\"\u003e\r\n        \u003ch5 class=\"mb-0\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cbutton class=\"btn btn-link text-decoration-none p-0\" type=\"button\" data-bs-toggle=\"collapse\" data-bs-target=\"#teamRoutesCollapse\" aria-expanded=\"true\" aria-controls=\"teamRoutesCollapse\"\u003e\r\n                \u003ci class=\"bi bi-chevron-down me-1\"\u003e\u003c/i\u003e Team Routes\r\n            \u003c/button\u003e\r\n        \u003c/h5\u003e\r\n        \u003cbutton class=\"btn btn-primary btn-sm\" onclick=\"testAllTeamRoutes()\"\u003eTest All Team Routes\u003c/button\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"collapse show\" id=\"teamRoutesCollapse\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n            \u003c!-- get_team_details --\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card mb-3\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eget_team_details\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003csmall class=\"text-muted\"\u003e/team/get_team_details\u003c/small\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv class=\"mb-3 d-flex align-items-center\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003cbutton class=\"btn btn-primary me-2\" onclick=\"testTeamDetails()\"\u003eTest Route\u003c/button\u003e\r\n                        \u003cspan id=\"teamDetailsTime\" class=\"text-muted\"\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"teamDetailsResult\" class=\"result-container\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Results will be shown here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \r\n            \u003c!-- get_team_season_performance --\u003e\r\n",

          },
          {

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class MatchDayBlock extends BaseContentBlock {\n    ...\n    generateHTML(state) {\n\r\n                    \r\n                    ...\n\r\n                    \r\n                    \u003c!-- Individual Performance Section (Full Width) --\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv class=\"row mt-4\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003cdiv class=\"col-12\"\u003e\r\n                            \u003cdiv id=\"weekIndividualAveragesCard\"\u003e\r\n                                \u003cdiv class=\"text-center py-3\"\u003e\r\n                                    \u003cdiv class=\"spinner-border text-primary\" role=\"status\"\u003e\r\n                                        \u003cspan class=\"visually-hidden\"\u003e${typeof t === 'function' ? t('status.loading', 'Loading individual averages...') : 'Loading individual averages...'}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                    \r\n                    \u003c!-- Team vs Team Comparison Section (Full Width) --\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv class=\"row mt-4\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003cdiv class=\"col-12\"\u003e\r\n                            \u003cdiv id=\"team-vs-team-comparison-matchday\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n                        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        &#96;;\r\n    }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "class MatchDayBlock extends BaseContentBlock {\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "    constructor() {\r"

          {

            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "    generateHTML(state) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "        const leagueName = state.league_long || state.league || '';"

          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": " 'Loading honor scores...'}\u003c/span\u003e\r"

            "text": "                        &#96;}\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "                    \r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "                    \u003c!-- Individual Performance Section (Full Width) --\u003e\r"
```

_**Agent (composer-1)**_

The HTML structure matches the team-details-block pattern. The buttons should appear in the top-right corner of the card header. Added debugging logs to verify they render.

**To test:**
1. Select a team from the team buttons
2. Open the browser console (F12)
3. Look for these logs:
   - "TeamPerformanceBlock: Rendering HTML with filter buttons" — confirms HTML is being set
   - "TeamPerformanceBlock: Buttons check after HTML render" — shows if buttons are found in the DOM

**The buttons should appear:**
- In the top-right corner of the "Individual Player Performance" card header
- As three buttons: "Punkte", "Score", "Both"
- Styled like the "Klassisch"/"Neu" buttons in the SLTW view

**If the buttons still don't appear:**
1. Check the console logs — do they show the buttons are found?
2. Inspect the HTML — right-click the card header and "Inspect Element" to see if the buttons are in the DOM
3. Check CSS — verify Bootstrap CSS is loaded (buttons use Bootstrap classes)

The HTML structure is correct. The console logs will help identify if it's a rendering issue, CSS problem, or something else. Share what you see in the console after selecting a team.

---

_**User (2025-12-13 10:03:28Z)**_

why should it appear on the individual players performance? i is meant to filter the contents of the heatmap on team performance! in addition, the buttons dont show anyway

---

_**Agent (composer-1)**_

Locating where the team comparison heatmap table is rendered and adding the filter buttons there:

```json
        "contents": "function renderTeamVsTeamComparison(data, options) {\n\r\n\r\n    ...\n\r\n\r\n    // Create table using Tabulator\r\n    if (typeof createTableTabulator === 'function') {\r\n        const tableOptions = {\r\n            disablePositionCircle,\r\n            enableSpecialRowStyling: true,\r\n            tooltips: true,\r\n            enableHeatMap\r\n        };\r\n        \r\n        if (teamField) {\r\n            tableOptions.teamField = teamField;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        createTableTabulator(tableId, data, tableOptions);\r\n    } else if (typeof createTableBootstrap3 === 'function') {\r\n        // Fallback to Bootstrap\r\n        createTableBootstrap3(tableId, data, {\r\n            disablePositionCircle,\r\n            enableSpecialRowStyling: true,\r\n            enableHeatMap\r\n        });\r\n    } else {\r\n        console.error('Table creation function not available');\r\n    }\r\n}",

          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "/**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": " * Loads and renders team vs team comparison with error handling\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": " * @param {Object} params - Parameters for fetching data\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": " * @param {string} params.league - League name\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": " * @param {string} params.season - Season identifier\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": " * @param {number} [params.week] - Optional week number\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": " * @param {Object} renderOptions - Options for rendering (see renderTeamVsTeamComparison)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": " * @param {string} [errorMessage] - Custom error message to display on failure\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": " */"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    // Create table using Tabulator\r\n    if (typeof createTableTabulator === 'function') {\r\n        const tableOptions = {\r\n            disablePositionCircle,\r\n            enableSpecialRowStyling: true,\r\n            tooltips: true,\r\n            enableHeatMap\r\n        };\r\n        \r\n        if (teamField) {\r\n            tableOptions.teamField = teamField;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        createTableTabulator(tableId, data, tableOptions);\r\n    } else if (typeof createTableBootstrap3 === 'function') {\r\n        // Fallback to Bootstrap\r\n        createTableBootstrap3(tableId, data, {\r\n            disablePositionCircle,\r\n            enableSpecialRowStyling: true,\r\n            enableHeatMap\r\n        });\r\n    } else {\r\n        console.error('Table creation function not available');\r\n    }\r\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Renders the team vs team comparison card and table\r\n * @param {Object} data - Team vs team comparison data from API\r\n * @param {Object} options - Rendering options\r\n * @param {string} options.containerId - ID of the container element to render into\r\n * @param {string} options.tableId - ID for the table element (will be created inside container)\r\n * @param {string} [options.headerLevel='h6'] - HTML header level ('h5', 'h6', etc.)\r\n * @param {boolean} [options.disablePositionCircle=false] - Whether to disable position circles\r\n * @param {boolean} [options.enableHeatMap=true] - Whether to enable heat map\r\n * @param {string} [options.teamField] - Field name for team identification (for position circles)\r\n */\r\nfunction renderTeamVsTeamComparison(data, options) {\r\n    const {\r\n        containerId,\r\n        tableId,\r\n        headerLevel = 'h6',\r\n        disablePositionCircle = false,\r\n        enableHeatMap = true,\r\n        teamField = null\r\n    } = options;\r\n\r\n    if (!data || !data.columns || !data.data) {\r\n        console.warn('No team vs team comparison data available');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    const container = document.getElementById(containerId);\r\n    if (!container) {\r\n        console.error(&#96;Team vs team comparison container not found: ${containerId}&#96;);\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Get translation function if available\r\n    const t = typeof window.t === 'function' ? window.t : null;\r\n    const getText = (key, fallback) =\u003e (t ? t(key, fallback) : fallback);\r\n\r\n    // Use title and description from API response (which includes proper i18n with article_male + season/week)\r\n    // The backend provides: title with i18n, and description with \"team_vs_team_comparison_matrix_explanation\" + article_male + season/week\r\n    const title = data.title || getText('team_vs_team_comparison_matrix', 'Team vs Team Comparison Matrix');",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "async function fetchTeamVsTeamComparison({ league, season, week = null }) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "    return data;\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "/**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": " * Renders the team vs team comparison card and table\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": " * @param {Object} data - Team vs team comparison data from API\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": " * @param {Object} options - Rendering options\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": " * @param {string} options.containerId - ID of the container element to render into\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": " * @param {string} options.tableId - ID for the table element (will be created inside container)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": " * @param {string} [options.headerLevel='h6'] - HTML header level ('h5', 'h6', etc.)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": " * @param {boolean} [options.disablePositionCircle=false] - Whether to disable position circles\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": " * @param {boolean} [options.enableHeatMap=true] - Whether to enable heat map\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": " * @param {string} [options.teamField] - Field name for team identification (for position circles)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": " */\r"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "function renderTeamVsTeamComparison(data, options) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "    const {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "        containerId,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "        tableId,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "        headerLevel = 'h6',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "        disablePositionCircle = false,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "        enableHeatMap = true,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "        teamField = null\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "    } = options;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "    if (!data || !data.columns || !data.data) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "        console.warn('No team vs team comparison data available');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "    const container = document.getElementById(containerId);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "    if (!container) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "        console.error(&#96;Team vs team comparison container not found: ${containerId}&#96;);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "        return;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "    // Get translation function if available\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "    const t = typeof window.t === 'function' ? window.t : null;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "    const getText = (key, fallback) =\u003e (t ? t(key, fallback) : fallback);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "    // Use title and description from API response (which includes proper i18n with article_male + season/week)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    // The backend provides: title with i18n, and description with \"team_vs_team_comparison_matrix_explanation\" + article_male + season/week\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "    const title = data.title || getText('team_vs_team_comparison_matrix', 'Team vs Team Comparison Matrix');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "    const description = data.description ||;"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Renders the team vs team comparison card and table\r\n * @param {Object} data - Team vs team comparison data from API\r\n * @param {Object} options - Rendering options\r\n * @param {string} options.containerId - ID of the container element to render into\r\n * @param {string} options.tableId - ID for the table element (will be created inside container)\r\n * @param {string} [options.headerLevel='h6'] - HTML header level ('h5', 'h6', etc.)\r\n * @param {boolean} [options.disablePositionCircle=false] - Whether to disable position circles\r\n * @param {boolean} [options.enableHeatMap=true] - Whether to enable heat map\r\n * @param {string} [options.teamField] - Field name for team identification (for position circles)\r\n */\r\nfunction renderTeamVsTeamComparison(data, options) {\r\n    const {\r\n        containerId,\r\n        tableId,\r\n        headerLevel = 'h6',\r\n        disablePositionCircle = false,\r\n        enableHeatMap = true,\r\n        teamField = null\r\n    } = options;\r\n\r\n    if (!data || !data.columns || !data.data) {\r\n        console.warn('No team vs team comparison data available');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    const container = document.getElementById(containerId);\r\n    if (!container) {\r\n        console.error(&#96;Team vs team comparison container not found: ${containerId}&#96;);\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Get translation function if available\r\n    const t = typeof window.t === 'function' ? window.t : null;\r\n    const getText = (key, fallback) =\u003e (t ? t(key, fallback) : fallback);\r\n\r\n    // Use title and description from API response (which includes proper i18n with article_male + season/week)\r\n    // The backend provides: title with i18n, and description with \"team_vs_team_comparison_matrix_explanation\" + article_male + season/week\r\n    const title = data.title || getText('team_vs_team_comparison_matrix', 'Team vs Team Comparison Matrix');",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 153
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 13
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/static/js/utils/team-vs-team-utils.js"
      },
      "score": 0.4148326516151428

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "                        if (data.title \u0026\u0026 (data.title.includes('Team vs Team Comparison') || data.title.includes('Team vs Team Vergleichsmatrix')) \u0026\u0026 groupIndex === 0 \u0026\u0026 index === 0) {\r\n                            // Special handling for team vs team comparison table - first column shows team name with color\r\n                            const teamName = value;\r\n                            let color = \"#888\"; // fallback color\r\n                            \r\n                            if (typeof window.getTeamColor === 'function') {\r\n                                color = window.getTeamColor(teamName);\r\n                            } else if (window.teamColorMap \u0026\u0026 window.teamColorMap[teamName]) {\r\n                                color = window.teamColorMap[teamName];\r\n                            }\r\n                            \r\n                            td.innerHTML = &#96;\u003cdiv style=\"display: flex; align-items: center;\"\u003e\r\n                                \u003cdiv style=\"width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: ${color}; margin-right: 8px;\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n                                \u003cspan\u003e${teamName}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                            \u003c/div\u003e&#96;;\r\n                        } else if (groupIndex === 0 \u0026\u0026 index === 0 \u0026\u0026 !disablePositionCircle) {\r\n                            // Special handling for position column (first column of first group) - regular tables\r\n                            // Use the position value (not team name) for the circle\r\n                            const color = getTeamColor(rowData[1]); // Still use team name for color\r\n                            td.innerHTML = &#96;\u003cdiv style=\"width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: ${color}; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: white; font-weight: bold; margin: 0 auto;\"\u003e${value}\u003c/div\u003e&#96;;\r\n                        } else {\r\n                            td.textContent = value;\r\n                        }\r\n                        \r\n",

        "originalContents": "                        if (data.title \u0026\u0026 (data.title.includes('Team vs Team Comparison') || data.title.includes('Team vs Team Vergleichsmatrix')) \u0026\u0026 groupIndex === 0 \u0026\u0026 index === 0) {\r\n                                    // Special handling for team vs team comparison table - first column shows team name with color\r\n                                    const teamName1 = value1;\r\n                                    const teamName2 = value2;\r\n                                    \r\n                                    let color1 = \"#888\"; // fallback color\r\n                                    let color2 = \"#888\"; // fallback color\r\n                                    \r\n                                    if (typeof window.getTeamColor === 'function') {\r\n                                        color1 = window.getTeamColor(teamName1);\r\n                                        color2 = window.getTeamColor(teamName2);\r\n                                    } else if (window.teamColorMap) {\r\n                                        color1 = window.teamColorMap[teamName1] || \"#888\";\r\n                                        color2 = window.teamColorMap[teamName2] || \"#888\";\r\n                                    }\r\n                                    \r\n                                    td1.innerHTML = &#96;\u003cdiv style=\"display: flex; align-items: center;\"\u003e\r\n                                        \u003cdiv style=\"width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: ${color1}; margin-right: 8px;\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n                                        \u003cspan\u003e${teamName1}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                                    \u003c/div\u003e&#96;;\r\n                                    td2.innerHTML = &#96;\u003cdiv style=\"display: flex; align-items: center;\"\u003e\r\n                                        \u003cdiv style=\"width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: ${color2}; margin-right: 8px;\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n                                        \u003cspan\u003e${teamName2}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                                    ",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    // Get table configuration\r\n    const config = data.config || {};\r\n    \r\n    // Get options with defaults\r\n    const { disablePositionCircle = false, mergeCells = false, enableSpecialRowStyling = false } = options;\r\n    \r\n    // Initialize team colors if this is a table with team data\r\n    if (data.data \u0026\u0026 data.data.length \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 data.data[0].length \u003e 1) {\r\n        // Extract team names from the data\r\n        // For most tables, team name is in the second column (row[1])\r\n        // For team vs team comparison, team name is in the first column (row[0])\r\n        let teams = [];\r\n        \r\n        \r\n        // Check if this is a team vs team comparison table (has \"Team vs Team Comparison\" in title)\r\n        if (data.title \u0026\u0026 data.title.includes('Team vs Team Comparison')) {\r\n            teams = data.data.map(row =\u003e row[0]).filter(team =\u003e team \u0026\u0026 typeof team === 'string');\r\n        } else {\r\n            // Standard tables with team names in second column\r\n            teams = data.data.map(row =\u003e row[1]).filter(team =\u003e team \u0026\u0026 typeof team === 'string');\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        if (teams.length \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 typeof window.updateTeamColorMap === 'function') {\r\n            window.updateTeamColorMap(teams);\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Create table wrapper for horizontal scroll\r\n    const tableWrapper = document.createElement('div');\r\n    tableWrapper.className = 'table-responsive';\r\n\r\n    // Create table\r\n    const table = document.createElement('table');\r\n    table.className = 'table';\r\n    if (config.striped) table.classList.add('table-striped');\r\n    if (config.hover) table.classList.add('table-hover');\r\n    if (config.compact) table.classList.add('table-sm');\r\n    table.style.borderCollapse = 'collapse';\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1402,
            "text": "            columns: data.columns\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1403,
            "text": "        }];\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 1416,
            "text": "        // For team vs team comparison, team name is in the first column (row[0])\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 1417,
            "text": "        let teams = [];\r"

            "lineNumber": 1418,
            "text": "        \r"

            "text": "            teams = data.data.map(row =\u003e row[0]).filter(team =\u003e team \u0026\u0026 typeof team === 'string');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1423,
            "text": "        } else {\r"
          },

          {

            "text": "            teams = data.data.map(row =\u003e row[1]).filter(team =\u003e team \u0026\u0026 typeof team === 'string');\r"

          },
          {

            "text": "            window.updateTeamColorMap(teams);\r"
          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1432,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1433,
            "text": "    // Create table wrapper for horizontal scroll\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1434,
            "text": "    const tableWrapper = document.createElement('div');\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 1437,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1438,
            "text": "    const table = document.createElement('table');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1439,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1440,
            "text": "    if (config.striped) table.classList.add('table-striped');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1441,
            "text": "    if (config.hover) table.classList.add('table-hover');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1442,
            "text": "    if (config.compact) table.classList.add('table-sm');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1443,
            "text": "    table.style.borderCollapse = 'collapse';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1444,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1445,
            "text": "    // Add title and description if provided\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    // Get table configuration\r\n    const config = data.config || {};\r\n    \r\n    // Get options with defaults\r\n    const { disablePositionCircle = false, mergeCells = false, enableSpecialRowStyling = false } = options;\r\n    \r\n    // Initialize team colors if this is a table with team data\r\n    if (data.data \u0026\u0026 data.data.length \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 data.data[0].length \u003e 1) {\r\n        // Extract team names from the data\r\n        // For most tables, team name is in the second column (row[1])\r\n        // For team vs team comparison, team name is in the first column (row[0])\r\n        let teams = [];\r\n        \r\n        \r\n        // Check if this is a team vs team comparison table (has \"Team vs Team Comparison\" in title)\r\n        if (data.title \u0026\u0026 data.title.includes('Team vs Team Comparison')) {\r\n            teams = data.data.map(row =\u003e row[0]).filter(team =\u003e team \u0026\u0026 typeof team === 'string');\r\n        } else {\r\n            // Standard tables with team names in second column\r\n            teams = data.data.map(row =\u003e row[1]).filter(team =\u003e team \u0026\u0026 typeof team === 'string');\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        if (teams.length \u003e 0 \u0026\u0026 typeof window.updateTeamColorMap === 'function') {\r\n            window.updateTeamColorMap(teams);\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Create table wrapper for horizontal scroll\r\n    const tableWrapper = document.createElement('div');\r\n    tableWrapper.className = 'table-responsive';\r\n\r\n    // Create table\r\n    const table = document.createElement('table');\r\n    table.className = 'table';\r\n    if (config.striped) table.classList.add('table-striped');\r\n    if (config.hover) table.classList.add('table-hover');\r\n    if (config.compact) table.classList.add('table-sm');\r\n    table.style.borderCollapse = 'collapse';\r\n",

          "startPosition": {
            "line": 1401
          }

        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n    ...\n    def get_team_vs_team_comparison_table(self, league: str, season: str, week: int = None) -\u003e 'TableData':\n\n                ...\n\n                for opponent in sorted_teams:\n                    if team != opponent:\n                        if opponent in comparison_data[team]:\n                            score = comparison_data[team][opponent]['avg_score']\n                            points = comparison_data[team][opponent]['avg_points']\n                        else:\n                            score = 0.0\n                            points = 0.0\n                        \n                        row.extend([score, points])\n                        col_idx += 2\n                    else:\n                        # Diagonal cells - empty cells\n                        row.extend([\"\", \"\"])\n                        cell_metadata[f\"{row_idx}:{col_idx}\"] = {\"backgroundColor\": get_theme_color(\"background\")}\n                        cell_metadata[f\"{row_idx}:{col_idx + 1}\"] = {\"backgroundColor\": get_theme_color(\"background\")}\n                        col_idx += 2\n                \n                table_data.append(row)\n            \n            # Heatmap coloring is now handled in the frontend\n            # ========== RETURN TABLE DATA ==========\n            return TableData(\n                columns=columns,\n                data=table_data,\n                title=i18n_service.get_text(\"team_vs_team_comparison_matrix\"),\n                description=f\"{i18n_service.get_text('team_vs_team_comparison_matrix_explanation')}{f' {i18n_service.get_text('week')} {week}.' if week else f' {i18n_service.get_text('article_male')} {i18n_service.get_text('season')}.'}\",\n                config={\n                    \"striped\": True,\n                    \"hover\": True,\n                    \"compact\": True,\n                    \"stickyHeader\": True\n                },\n                metadata={\n                    \"score_range\": {\"min\": score_min, \"max\": score_max},\n                    \"points_range\": {\"min\": points_min, \"max\": points_max},\n                    \"week\": week\n                }\n            )",
        "detailedLines": [

            "text": "class LeagueService:"

            "text": "    def __init__(self, adapter_type=DataAdapterSelector.PANDAS, database: str = None):"

        ],
        "originalContents": "\n                for opponent in sorted_teams:\n                    if team != opponent:\n                        if opponent in comparison_data[team]:\n                            score = comparison_data[team][opponent]['avg_score']\n                            points = comparison_data[team][opponent]['avg_points']\n                        else:\n                            score = 0.0\n                            points = 0.0\n                        \n                        row.extend([score, points])\n                        col_idx += 2\n                    else:\n                        # Diagonal cells - empty cells\n                        row.extend([\"\", \"\"])\n                        cell_metadata[f\"{row_idx}:{col_idx}\"] = {\"backgroundColor\": get_theme_color(\"background\")}\n                        cell_metadata[f\"{row_idx}:{col_idx + 1}\"] = {\"backgroundColor\": get_theme_color(\"background\")}\n                        col_idx += 2\n                \n                table_data.append(row)\n            \n            # Heatmap coloring is now handled in the frontend\n            # ========== RETURN TABLE DATA ==========\n            return TableData(\n                columns=columns,\n                data=table_data,\n                title=i18n_service.get_text(\"team_vs_team_comparison_matrix\"),\n                description=f\"{i18n_service.get_text('team_vs_team_comparison_matrix_explanation')}{f' {i18n_service.get_text('week')} {week}.' if week else f' {i18n_service.get_text('article_male')} {i18n_service.get_text('season')}.'}\",\n                config={\n                    \"striped\": True,\n                    \"hover\": True,\n                    \"compact\": True,\n                    \"stickyHeader\": True\n                },\n                metadata={\n                    \"score_range\": {\"min\": score_min, \"max\": score_max},\n                    \"points_range\": {\"min\": points_min, \"max\": points_max},\n                    \"week\": week\n                }\n            )",

        "contents": "class LeagueSeasonOverviewBlock extends BaseContentBlock {\n\n\n    ...\n\n\n    async loadTeamVsTeamComparison(league, season) {\n        // Use shared utility function that handles both loading and rendering\n        if (typeof loadAndRenderTeamVsTeamComparison === 'function') {\n            await loadAndRenderTeamVsTeamComparison(\n                { league, season },\n                {\n                    containerId: 'team-vs-team-comparison-inline',\n                    tableId: 'team-vs-team-comparison-table-inline',\n                    headerLevel: 'h6',\n                    disablePositionCircle: false,  // Enable position circles\n                    enableHeatMap: true,\n                    teamField: 'team'  // Specify team field for colored circles\n                },\n                typeof t === 'function' ? t('no_data', 'Team vs team comparison not available') : 'Team vs team comparison not available'\n            );\n        } else {\n            console.error('loadAndRenderTeamVsTeamComparison utility function not available');\n            const container = document.getElementById('team-vs-team-comparison-inline');\n            if (container) {\n                container.innerHTML = &#96;\u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-info\"\u003e${typeof t === 'function' ? t('no_data', 'Team vs team comparison not available') : 'Team vs team comparison not available'}\u003c/div\u003e&#96;;\n            }\n        }\n    }",

        "contents": "class LeagueComparisonBlock extends BaseContentBlock {\n\r\n    \r\n    ...\n\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Render the comparison table\r\n     */\r\n    renderComparisonTable(data) {\r\n        const tableContainer = document.getElementById('tableLeagueComparison');\r\n        if (!tableContainer) {\r\n            console.warn('Table container not found, skipping table render');\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        const seasons = Object.keys(data).sort();\r\n        \r\n        // Create comparison table data\r\n        const tableData = seasons.map(season =\u003e {\r\n            const seasonData = data[season];\r\n            return [\r\n                season,\r\n                seasonData.league_name,\r\n                seasonData.performance_rank,\r\n                seasonData.team_performance.team_average_score,\r\n                seasonData.league_averages.average_score,\r\n                seasonData.team_performance.vs_league_score \u003e 0 ? \r\n                    &#96;+${seasonData.team_performance.vs_league_score}&#96; : \r\n                    seasonData.team_performance.vs_league_score\r\n            ];\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        const tableConfig = {\r\n            data: tableData,\r\n            columns: [\r\n                { title: (typeof t === 'function' ?     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\n{% block content %}\n    {% include \"components/tables.html\" %}\n    {% include \"components/charts.html\" %}\n\n    \u003cstyle\u003e\n        /* Ensure Bootstrap button styling works properly */\n        .btn-check:checked + .btn-outline-primary {\n            background-color: var(--theme-primary, #0d6efd) !important;\n            border-color: var(--theme-primary, #0d6efd) !important;\n            color: white !important;\n        }\n        \n        .btn-check:focus + .btn-outline-primary {\n            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.25rem rgba(13, 110, 253, 0.25) !important;\n        }\n    \u003c/style\u003e\n\n    \u003c!-- Selection Message --\u003e\n    \u003cdiv id=\"selectionMessage\" class=\"alert alert-danger fs-4\"\u003e\n        Bitte wählen Sie ein Team.\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\n    \u003c!-- Filter Controls --\u003e\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\n            \u003ch4\u003eTeam Statistics\u003c/h4\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\n            \u003c!-- Selection Area --\u003e\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-3\"\u003e\n                    \u003ch5\u003eTeam\u003c/h5\u003e\n                    \u003cselect id=\"teamSelect\" class=\"form-select\"\u003e\n                        \u003coption value=\"\"\u003eBitte wählen...\u003c/option\u003e\n                    \u003c/select\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-9\"\u003e\n                    \u003ch5\u003eSaison\u003c/h5\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsSeason\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\n                        \u003c!-- Seasons will be inserted here --\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}"

        "originalContents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\n{% block content %}\n    {% include \"components/tables.html\" %}\n    {% include \"components/charts.html\" %}\n\n    \u003cstyle\u003e\n        /* Ensure Bootstrap button styling works properly */\n        .btn-check:checked + .btn-outline-primary {\n            background-color: var(--theme-primary, #0d6efd) !important;\n            border-color: var(--theme-primary, #0d6efd) !important;\n            color: white !important;\n        }\n        \n        .btn-check:focus + .btn-outline-primary {\n            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.25rem rgba(13, 110, 253, 0.25) !important;\n        }\n    \u003c/style\u003e\n\n    \u003c!-- Selection Message --\u003e\n    \u003cdiv id=\"selectionMessage\" class=\"alert alert-danger fs-4\"\u003e\n        Bitte wählen Sie ein Team.\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\n    \u003c!-- Filter Controls --\u003e\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\n            \u003ch4\u003eTeam Statistics\u003c/h4\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\n            \u003c!-- Selection Area --\u003e\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-3\"\u003e\n                    \u003ch5\u003eTeam\u003c/h5\u003e\n                    \u003cselect id=\"teamSelect\" class=\"form-select\"\u003e\n                        \u003coption value=\"\"\u003eBitte wählen...\u003c/option\u003e\n                    \u003c/select\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-9\"\u003e\n                    \u003ch5\u003eSaison\u003c/h5\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsSeason\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\n                        \u003c!-- Seasons will be inserted here --\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n",

```

```diff
@@ -168,4 +177,130 @@
      }
  }
+ 
+ /**
+  * Extract column metadata for filtering
+  */
+ function extractColumnMetadata(data) {
+     const metadata = {
+         allFields: [],
+         pointsFields: [],
+         scoreFields: [],
+         otherFields: []
+     };
+ 
+     if (!data.columns) {
+         return metadata;
+     }
+ 
+     // Flatten column structure to get all fields
+     const flattenColumns = (columns) =&gt; {
+         const fields = [];
+         columns.forEach((group) =&gt; {
+             if (group.columns &amp;&amp; Array.isArray(group.columns)) {
+                 group.columns.forEach((col) =&gt; {
+                     if (col.field) {
+                         fields.push(col.field);
+                     }
+                 });
+             }
+         });
+         return fields;
+     };
+ 
+     const allFields = flattenColumns(data.columns);
+     metadata.allFields = allFields;
+ 
+     // Categorize fields: points vs score
+     allFields.forEach((field) =&gt; {
+         const fieldLower = field.toLowerCase();
+         // Check for points first (to catch avg_points, etc.)
+         if (fieldLower.includes('points')) {
+             metadata.pointsFields.push(field);
+         } else if (fieldLower.includes('score')) {
+             // Score fields: anything with "score"
+             metadata.scoreFields.push(field);
+         } else {
+             // Other fields (team name, position, etc.) - always show
+             metadata.otherFields.push(field);
+         }
+     });
+ 
+     return metadata;
+ }
+ 
+ /**
+  * Attach event listeners for filter buttons
+  */
+ function attachTeamComparisonFilterListeners(tableId, columnMetadata) {
+     // Use event delegation on document to catch events from dynamically created buttons
+     const filterName = 'teamComparisonFilter';
+     
+     const filterListener = (event) =&gt; {
+         if (event.target.name === filterName &amp;&amp; event.target.id.startsWith(tableId + 'Filter')) {
+             const filterType = event.target.value;
+             console.log(&#96;Team comparison filter changed to: ${filterType} for table ${tableId}&#96;);
+             applyTeamComparisonFilter(tableId, filterType, columnMetadata);
+         }
+     };
+     
+     document.addEventListener('change', filterListener);
+     
+     // Set default checked state visually
+     setTimeout(() =&gt; {
+         const defaultButton = document.getElementById(&#96;${tableId}FilterBoth&#96;);
+         if (defaultButton) {
+             defaultButton.checked = true;
+         }
+     }, 100);
+ }
+ 
+ /**
+  * Apply filter to team comparison table
+  */
+ function applyTeamComparisonFilter(tableId, filterType, columnMetadata) {
+     const tableInstance = window[tableId + 'Instance'];
+     if (!tableInstance || !columnMetadata) {
+         return;
+     }
+ 
+     const { pointsFields, scoreFields, otherFields } = columnMetadata;
+ 
+     // Determine which fields to show
+     let fieldsToShow = [];
+     let fieldsToHide = [];
+ 
+     if (filterType === 'points') {
+         fieldsToShow = [...pointsFields, ...otherFields];
+         fieldsToHide = scoreFields;
+     } else if (filterType === 'score') {
+         fieldsToShow = [...scoreFields, ...otherFields];
+         fieldsToHide = pointsFields;
+     } else {
+         // 'both' - show all
+         fieldsToShow = [...pointsFields, ...scoreFields, ...otherFields];
+         fieldsToHide = [];
+     }
+ 
+     // Apply show/hide to columns
+     try {
+         // Get all columns from Tabulator
+         const allColumns = tableInstance.getColumns();
+         
+         allColumns.forEach((column) =&gt; {
+             const field = column.getField();
+             if (!field) {
+                 return; // Skip group headers
+             }
+ 
+             if (fieldsToHide.includes(field)) {
+                 column.hide();
+             } else if (fieldsToShow.includes(field)) {
+                 column.show();
+             }
+         });
+     } catch (error) {
+         console.error('Error applying team comparison filter:', error);
+     }
+ }
  
  /**
```

_**Agent (composer-1)**_

## Summary

Added filter buttons ("Points", "Score", "Both") to the team comparison heatmap table (Mannschaftsvergleich).

**Changes made:**

1. **Modified `team-vs-team-utils.js`**:
   - Added filter buttons to the card header (top-right corner, matching the SLTW "Classic"/"New" pattern)
   - Added `extractColumnMetadata()` to categorize columns (points vs score)
   - Added `attachTeamComparisonFilterListeners()` to handle button clicks
   - Added `applyTeamComparisonFilter()` to show/hide columns based on selection

2. **Removed filter buttons from `team-performance-block.js`**:
   - Removed the buttons from the individual player performance table header (they don't belong there)

**How it works:**
- The buttons appear in the top-right corner of the "Mannschaftsvergleich" (Team Comparison) card header
- "Both" is selected by default (shows all columns)
- Clicking "Points" shows only points columns
- Clicking "Score" shows only score columns
- The filter works by hiding/showing columns in the Tabulator table instance

**To test:**
1. Navigate to the league stats page with a league and season selected
2. The team comparison table should appear with filter buttons in the top-right corner
3. Click the buttons to filter the heatmap columns

The buttons should now appear on the team comparison heatmap table.

---

_**Agent (composer-1)**_

Updated the default filter to "Points" instead of "Both".

**Changes made:**

1. **HTML**: Moved `checked` from the "Both" radio button to the "Points" radio button
2. **Default filter application**: Changed from `'both'` to `'points'` when applying the initial filter
3. **Visual state**: Updated the button selection logic to set "Points" as checked by default

When the team comparison heatmap table loads, it will:
- Show only the Points columns by default (hiding Score columns)
- Have the "Points" button visually selected
- Allow users to switch to "Score" or "Both" as needed

The default is now "Points".

```json
        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n    ...\n    def get_team_vs_team_comparison_table(self, league: str, season: str, week: int = None) -\u003e 'TableData':\n\n                            \n                            ...\n\n                            \n                            avg_points = round(sum(total_points_list) / len(total_points_list), 1) if total_points_list else 0.0\n                        else:\n                            avg_score = 0.0\n                            avg_points = 0.0\n                        \n                        comparison_data[team][opponent] = {\n                            'avg_score': avg_score,\n                            'avg_points': avg_points\n                        }\n            \n            # ========== DATA EXTENSION: Calculate team averages and sort ==========\n            # Calculate average points for each team (across all opponents)\n            team_avg_points = {}\n            for team in teams:\n                team_points_list = []\n                for opponent in teams:\n                    if team != opponent and opponent in comparison_data[team]:\n                        team_points_list.append(comparison_data[team][opponent]['avg_points'])\n                team_avg_points[team] = sum(team_points_list) / len(team_points_list) if team_points_list else 0\n            \n            # Sort teams by average points (descending) - this determines row/column order\n            sorted_teams = sorted(teams, key=lambda t: team_avg_points[t], reverse=True)\n            team_positions = {team: pos + 1 for pos, team in enumerate(sorted_teams)}",

        "contents": "class LeagueComparisonBlock extends BaseContentBlock {\n\r\n    \r\n    ...\n\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Render the comparison table\r\n     */\r\n    renderComparisonTable(data) {\r\n        const tableContainer = document.getElementById('tableLeagueComparison');\r\n        if (!tableContainer) {\r\n            console.warn('Table container not found, skipping table render');\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        const seasons = Object.keys(data).sort();\r\n        \r\n        // Create comparison table data\r\n        const tableData = seasons.map(season =\u003e {\r\n            const seasonData = data[season];\r\n            return [\r\n                season,\r\n                seasonData.league_name,\r\n                seasonData.performance_rank,\r\n                seasonData.team_performance.team_average_score,\r\n                seasonData.league_averages.average_score,\r\n                seasonData.team_performance.vs_league_score \u003e 0 ? \r\n                    &#96;+${seasonData.team_performance.vs_league_score}&#96; : \r\n                    seasonData.team_performance.vs_league_score\r\n            ];\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        const tableConfig = {\r\n            data: tableData,\r\n            columns: [\r\n                { title: (typeof t === 'function' ? t('season', 'Season') : 'Season') },\r\n                { title: (typeof t === 'function' ? t('league', 'League') : 'League') },\r\n                { title: (typeof t === 'function' ? t('ranking', 'Ranking') : 'Ranking') },\r\n                { title: (typeof t === 'function' ?
```
